Dear Katiah, 

First of all we want to thank you for coming and want to clarify something to you. When you came with 10 people we offered you the group menu. We ended the evening with an excellent cappuccino, rich and creamy, which was the perfect finishing touch. We had an amazing birthday with a group of 12 people. We were a group of 19 people, and the restaurant was clearly not prepared for us. Our steaks were served completely raw. Normally, at a hot stone restaurant, the meat is raw on the inside but seared on the outside; that was not the case here. This was probably because of the size of our group, but they should have informed us beforehand.

When we arrived, there were six bottles of water on the table. We did not ask for them, yet we were charged 40 euros. While this may be acceptable, it is not good service. Customers should always be informed about what they are being charged for—items should not simply be placed on the table and added to the bill. I would not recommend this place to anyone.

Restaurant Review

We had dinner here this evening as a group of eight and had booked our table in advance. The restaurant was ready for us when we arrived, which we appreciated.

However, as soon as we were seated, we were encouraged to choose a fixed menu because we were a larger group. We preferred to order from the à la carte menu instead, but were then told that, due to our group size, we each had to order a side dish. This felt a bit unnecessary and slightly forced.

That said, the food itself was excellent – everything we ordered was delicious, well-prepared, and beautifully presented. There was absolutely nothing to complain about when it came to the quality of the dishes.

The service, on the other hand, didn’t quite match the same high standard. We didn’t feel particularly welcomed, and there was a sense that the staff were more focused on upselling than on ensuring a comfortable dining experience. At the end of the meal, we also noticed that five extra drinks had been added to our bill (at €6 each). Once we pointed it out, they corrected it immediately, but it did leave a slightly unpleasant impression.

Overall, while the food was great, the service and attitude fell short of what we expected – especially considering how the restaurant promotes itself as a family-friendly and welcoming place on their website.

Sides are fresh and thoughtfully paired, and the wine selection complements the dishes beautifully. Service is attentive without being intrusive, and the atmosphere is warm and inviting, perfect for both casual dinners and special occasions. Super quality of meat, Price quality ratio absolutely given. Very friendly and courteous Service. You roast your own meat on the spot and are instructed in advance exactly how to proceed. Rarely ate such a good steak. I'd love to come back.
Super quality of the meat, price-performance ratio absolutely given. Very friendly and accommodating service. You grill your meat yourself at the table and are given precise instructions on how to proceed. I have rarely eaten such a good steak. I will gladly come back.
The food here is really tasty, the prices are fair, and the staff is always kind and welcoming. Highly recommend! Xxxxxx

Beautiful food, excellent service-it was our 25th wedding anniversary and we got an amazing sparkler candle in complementary icecrean, coffee and lemon cello.
Fantastic restaurant the service was awesome.  Great experience.  Will definitely go back anytime we come to Amsterdam..
The food was delightful! We made a reservation for 8.30pm and sat outside.  I ordered the burger whilst my friend had lamb / steak which she cooked herself - lovely experience.
Best meat we’ve ever had, and the staff is great. 10/10, everything was amazing.  We’ll be back and can highly recommend!

The staff were on the ball, food was excellent and great value for money. If I wasn’t one for trying different places then we’d definitely return here another evening!! 

You will not be disappointed, stunning.

Great service, great foid, great atmosphere. Really warm welcome. Arrived a bit earlier than booked for but was no issue. Made to feel like home, staff were helpful and engaging. Enjoyed the hot stone steaks and the fries were amazing

Fab restaurant, attentive staff and lovely steak. You cook it yourself on a lava stone which is great as you can decide exactly how you want it cooked. Lovely sides and dessert. Great value for money and wonderful friendly staff. Highly recommended!
Delicious steaks, friendly service for a very reasonable price. Very good experience, we will definitely be back here
Friendly and welcoming place. Everyone was so kind. We did not feel rushed. Dinner was wonderful! Service and food was great!
Mazeltov, Lamp chop on the stone... the service and the team!!! The experience was amazing ! I recommend!!!! A must do!!!

Visited here on the strength of the really good trip advisor reviews. The meal started well, the order for food and drinks was taken quickly. Things went downhill after that. Our server said she’d come back to cut my husband’s T-bone steak. She didn’t. Once our main course was finished it was a long time before anyone came back. Somebody came and opened the desert menu and put it in front of us. But nobody came for our order. It was impossible to catch anyone’s eye. Eventually we decided we didn’t want to wait any longer but again it took ages before we could get anyone’s attention to ask for the bill. We could see other diners looking around in the same way as us. We eventually paid and were offered a free limoncello to apologise for the bad service. I don’t know what went wrong that night, but something did.

We went there because we were looking for a steakhouse that would be honest and nice.
And we found it so this store has fantastic food specifically we got 2 rib eye steaks, a T-bone steak and lastly a chicken burger. You baked the steaks yourself and that was the best place you baked it like you wanted. It was accompanied by country fried or baked potatoes , or otherwise salad . The prices were fantastic and worth it for what you ate. The staff was polite and cheerful and specifically Magda who served us!! .I recommend it to everyone!!!

Really good steaks and super friendly staff!
We were welcomed nicely, the process was explained to us great or the T-bone also disassembled at the table for further barbecue.
The side dishes were delicious and the price for the quality is hard to believe.
A really great experience!!!

It was perfect!
Meet on the stones taste so good!

We tried this nice steak restaurant downtown not very far from Dam area. Steak was really tasty and delicious specially the tenderloin steak 🥩 my friend got, I got the ribs they were good but if they were hot it would be even better. I loved the mojitos they made so good 🫰🏼

We had steak, and fish and chips and the food was amazing! Magda was our server and was excellent.  The cheesecake was also delicious!
We have been coming here every month for the past year and it never disappoints us. However, portions seem smaller, and since Magda is no longer working here, it doesn't feel as welcoming!
Always good food and service is always good and fast. We have been here more often and every time it feels like welcome
Fabulous service with the BEST food. Friendly family run restaurant with the freshest food. We had lamb and prawns, cooked at the table. I highly recommend
Very nice meat, very friendly service. Highly recommended for anyone who likes a nice homemade piece of meat.
A great restaurant with excellent Argentinian meat cooked on stone, there is even for lovers of wagyu. I recommend 200%

Stonegrill 1870 does not serve steak. It serves a minor existential crisis, sizzling on a slab of volcanic rock.

We ordered the Porterhouse and Tomahawk - partly out of curiosity, mostly out of greed. Both arrived like trophies from a more decadent era: beautifully marbled, absurdly indulgent, and impossible to fault. If you’re the sort of person who enjoys cooking your own food at the table, but with far better ingredients and none of the clean-up, you’ll feel right at home.

Bav, our waiter, walked the line between attentive and invisible with the precision of a man who’s seen things. He handled everything with calm efficiency, as if effortlessly managing carnivores was just another Tuesday.

If you’re in Amsterdam and want a meal that feels like both an event and a small victory, book a table. Bring an appetite. Maybe leave your conscience at the door.

Excellent service 
Matilda service fantastic..

As was all the staff.

Great Location just off Central.

Food brilliant 

Decent price with wine and excellent food.

Would fully recommend
Good steaks and good Service. Many of the steaks are served on a hot stone. But also the burgers and the rips are delicious.
Fine steakhouse with great Mood. Much of the hot stone. Great meat selection, great card. Attentive and nice Service. With a birthday surprise for my wife. Fair prices.

Everything from decor, to food and service was excellent !!!  We have been here for a couple of days and this meal was outstanding. I would recommend it. Cooking your own steak to your liking is a plus.
A lovely restaurant with a friendly, attentive team to look after you. We had a caprese salad and tomato soup, and hot stone Tenderloin steaks which were beautiful. Highly recommend.

Highly recommend this gem restaurant!  The ribs and salmon were superb. we chose not to do the cook your own steak on a hot stone, but we observed those around us raving about it.  Friendly and impeccable service too! Very near central station. Bravo!

At first, cautiously excited… then as the evening started rolling I got it. Highly recommended, the staff(all) amazing.

Matilde was very kind with us and made sure our evening went well

Overall highly recommended, and take your time and enjoy
Great food, very nice service.  We got the 2x burger and shared it.  Was perfect amount.  Blankets on the chairs are a nice touch.
The best steak we have had for a very long time and excellent staff. The experience of cooking on the hot stone is perfect and thoroughly enjoyed our meal. We will be back

Great staff 
Superb food
Fantastic Experience 
Excellent location 
Highly recommend to anyone visiting Amsterdam !!!!
Wonderful spot. Staff was very accommodating and friendly. The place had a cool vibe. The food was very tasty. We tried the ribs and sirloin.
We had fabulous food and the staff were very welcoming and friendly, would definitely recommend going! I had the black tiger prawns and it was fantastic.
Fabulous service!  Fun concept for table grilling! Lived it. Excellent food, Angus teak was succulent, great drink selection
Wonderful restaurant! Had the tenderloin on the stone grill, so good and fun to cook! Hubby had the burger and fries! Service was terrific! Wine good too!!

I had an incredible dining experience at days stengel, and it’s easily one of the best steakhouses i’ve been to in a long time. from the moment we walked in, the service was attentive, welcoming, and knowledgeable. the ambience was warm and inviting perfect for a special occasion. 

Cooked to absolute perfection, my ribeye was juicy, flavorful, and had the beautiful sear in the outside. you can actually tell they use high quality steak and freshly served with the raw meat. creamy potato’s and great mushroom sauce. Thanks to the great waiter! overall great experience here in Amsterdam.

⭐ 1 out of 5 stars

We visited Day Stonegrill 1870 as a couple and ordered two striploin steaks with fries and pepper sauce. The idea of cooking the meat on a hot stone was fine, and the meat itself was okay – nothing special. Unfortunately, the sides were disappointing: the “fries” were actually potato wedges (not the traditional Dutch fries we expected), and the vegetables clearly came from frozen – and tasted like it.

The biggest issue, however, was the sauce. I had specifically ordered pepper sauce, but instead received a peanut sauce, without any warning. As someone with a peanut allergy, I had an allergic reaction. When I informed the staff, they didn’t take it seriously at all – they simply offered a new steak(!), which does not solve the problem.

There was no apology, and I was told that it was my responsibility to ask about allergens. I find this completely unreasonable – I ordered a steak with pepper sauce, and there’s no reason to expect peanut as an ingredient in that. I was later told that the sauce was “a gift from the chef”, but this should have been communicated at the table, especially since it resembled what I had ordered.

In the end: an allergic reaction, a replacement steak, and a bill of 85 euros. I expected a much more professional attitude toward allergens and customer service. Sadly, this ruined my evening. I cannot give more than one star.
Arrived there by chance, we were very pleasantly surprised. Very good meat served on hot plates and perfect Service.

Restaurant very welcoming. Grill on hot stones. Very good meat. Very good 
Nice terrace.  Recommended.
Delicious food and excellent service. The meat was perfect and very tasty. The waiter Valerie served us very kindly.

5
Friendly service and good food. Unique experience to cook your meat on a stone! Conveniently located around the corner from our hotel.

If you are looking for the best stone-cooked Halal meats, this place is a real gem! The quality of the meat is exceptional – juicy, tender and perfectly seasoned. Everything is prepared fresh on a hot stone, which gives a unique flavor and experience.

Although they serve alcohol, the Mood remains relaxed and family friendly. What makes this place really special is the owner – a very humble and down-to-earth person. He takes care of the Service himself and comes to see the customers, which is really nice. You can feel that he is passionate about what he does.

I highly recommend for an excellent barbecue evening with friends or family!

If you are looking for a dining experience that’s interactive as it is delicious, this StoneGrill place is an absolute must to visit when you’re in Amsterdam. From the moment we actually walked in we felt the warm and inviting welcome, that’s to the waitresses, with attentive staff who made us feel welcome and well taken care off by even cutting the steak. Each person got their own stone, which is heated to the perfect temperature, allowing you to cook to the perfect temperature and however I wanted my steak. We came with a group of 25 people and all of us did enjoy us as much as we could. I went for the black angus steak and it was incredibly juicy and tender, flavorful and perfectly marbly. The sides and sauces were equally impressive. What really made this polecat truly shine is the experience and the staff! Excellent!
A great place to enjoy the taste of delicious meat and excellent desserts. Very kind and professional service. Highly recommended!

For an addition of 200 euros to 4 and offer only one sauce and charge the other 2 euros??? Certainly the meat was good but the accompaniments all billed separately were frankly borderline bad. Service? Not nice. In short... I do not advise at all! A small positive rating for the preparation of rib beef, class!
Food and service 5 points. Meat of very good quality and it is nice that it is made on mini stone grill on the table.

It was absolutely delicious, from the grill on zhe hot stone to the dessert. Definetly coming back here! 

We got here very spontaneously and still got a table although we had no reservation. the staff was nice and efficient, the place was clean. Inside the vibe was industrial and cool, but we preferred to sit outside which was very nice too.
Very good dinner, very kind staff, very honest price. Absolutely recommended in a city obviously invaded by a wide culinary offer.
Amazing food & service—highly recommend this spot to anyone craving a truly great, solid steak experience! 10 / 10 restaurant!
Nice half self cooked tomahawk, chill spot, party of 5 loved the portable stone grill. Got a limoncello shot on the house.

Dear POIRIER I,
It's not fair to write a review when you didn't visit us. 
However, we would like to correct an important inaccuracy. The prices you mentioned are not correct — our most expensive dessert is €10.50, and we do not offer any desserts priced at €19.50 or €20, including the tiramisu or the dame blanche.
We understand that misunderstandings can happen, and we did try to explain it to you and that it's written correctly in the menu. If there was any miscommunication, we truly regret that. 
At DAY'S, transparency and honesty are very important to us, and we always aim to provide clear and accurate information to our guests.
We take all feedback seriously and continue to work hard to provide a warm and welcoming experience for everyone who visits us.
Kind regards,
Team DAY'S

The food was delicious, we had made a reservation and we’re hoping to sit inside, but they insisted we sit outside because no one was inside yet. That’s fine, there was some people watching as we sat on the patio, a little confusing about how much food we should order for a family of five. A little more guidance would have been helpful.

Super delicious food, very friendly service highly recommended. I was with my son over the weekend in Amsterdam and we found this steakhouse and would go back here anytime. Finally there is also a LIMONCELLO on the house.😋
Great steakhouse with juicy cuts, cozy atmosphere, and friendly staff. A must-visit for meat lovers! The best steakhouse in town!

The food was very delicious and the service very friendly.  Excellent quality meat. Cooked vegetables, delicious. 
Really recommend the restaurant
Everything was amazing. I ate a tenderloin steak and black tiger shrimps. My friend too and the waffle and dame blanche was amazing. Waitress was also amazing!!
Found this little gem online, all the reviews lived up to its name! The quality of the steak was great, the experience was fab cooking your own steak, Food and staff excellent! Highly recommend!
Very nice and kind service. The meat was fresh and tasty! We followed the directions they gave us to prepare the meat. Must try for sure!
Amazing fresh steaks! So impressed, the steaks were clean, fresh and they cut it fresh for you. Atmosphere is very cosy great service and decent prices. Definitely worth it

If you're craving a top-tier steakhouse experience, this place absolutely delivers. From the moment you walk in, the rich, warm atmosphere sets the tone for what turns out to be an exceptional dining experience.

The steaks? Simply amazing. Perfectly cooked, seasoned to perfection, and melt-in-your-mouth tender — every bite reminds you why steak is amazing.

Service was attentive and professional without being overbearing. The staff clearly knows the menu and is passionate about great food.
Ideal for a date night, special celebration, or when you just want to treat yourself.
This place is great for a casual dinner or lunch, great price for steak and we loved the Baileys drink. I loved our waitress, I didn’t catch her name sadly

Absolutely 11/10 brilliant 
No explanations needed the whole experience was superb the food the staff the atmosphere I cannot recommend this place enough !!!
This place is great for everything the service Magda was our waitress and she was amazing and very kind and diligent. The ambiance and one of the best services in town I would come back more!

It was amazing and the staff was super nice to us tourists. The food was out of this world and you get to cook your own steak to your liking!! I had the waffle for dessert which tasted super sweet and good. The tenderloin was also amazing I would 100% come back!!

Had a great meal here, sat outside on a nice July day. Booked in advance (recommend). We both had steak and an extra prawn main (which was amazing), which you have to cook yourself on the hot stone. The staff gave us instructions on how to get the best form the meat. We stayed quite a while and had a great time. Highly recommended.

This was a terrific spot for our night out in Amsterdam.  We are new friends who are traveling from America to Rotterdam to go on a Halland America Quilting Cruise. We had a fantastic dinner at the Stonehill Grill. We were waited on by a lovely young lady named Valerie and she answered our many questions!

Sat on the street and watched everyone walk by smelling my lamb sear on the stone in front of me. Loved every second.
Also- the salad was fresh and tasty.
We had a great time at the steakhouse – it was interesting, fun, and a new experience for us. We were very satisfied with both the service and the food. All in all, a very enjoyable visit!

Lovely and knowledgeable staff accompanied by great food. Comfortable environment with a really nice atmosphere.

The complimentary limoncello at the end was a brilliant way to end our last night in Amsterdam!
Amazing experience and great staff, would recommend it to everyone visiting Amsterdam ot living here, the tenderloins is to die for

Ayyyyeee! Was strolling by and stopped to look at the menu. A beautiful Day’s staff member came over to greet us and tell us about the experience….SHE WASN’T LYING. Tender ribeye cooked in front of me (by me) and a refreshing salad to round out my delicious meal.

We chose this restaurant because of its proximity to the train station/canal cruises and the many good reviews. 

We had the Wagyu Burger and the Spareribs for dinner. Both tasted very good to us. We were not satisfied with the grilled vegetables, which consisted entirely of frozen goods and had no bite. The staff was very attentive and we got our food quickly. 

The restaurant has a much wider range of food and meat choices than can be seen on the restaurant's website. Here we would like to see the complete map online. We found the drink prices good (0.5 Heineken 6,--EUR). We did not find the prices for burgers and spareribs, which come with side dishes to 25 EUR and 27.50 EUR respectively, quite reasonable. 

We would eat there again anytime.
Yes, the spot and the food is great! And Magda that served us was amazing. We were 12 people, we ate well and we are all very pleased!

Great service. They explained us how we will grill the steaks on the stone. They were very helpful with everything and we enjoyed it very much. Would recommend to anyone for descent steaks in Amsterdam.
The best steak we had in Amsterdam! Service and atmosphere is great! Visited twice during our stay. Will definitely visit again when we are back in Amsterdam

Unfortunately, we were not aware that if you come as a group of over 4, you are forced to choose from a menu of 3 to 4 courses, even if you do not want all of them. 
The mojito doesn't taste good at all... 
And the salad dressing is a little bland.

The Spar Ribs are a 10 out of 10. 
and the staff is very nice and accommodating!

Read great reviews about this restaurant and I can truly say they were accurate. 
Fantastic steak, great wine and the staff were friendly and accommodating. Will definitely come here again next time we are in Amsterdam and would highly recommend.
Supper good food!! Friendly staff, friendly staff! They don't make a big deal about allergies. All in all a very good experience!😊
Super nice restaurant, super good food, different experience because of stone grill, super good food and hugely nice staff

Outside eating - we did book but walk ins were fine . 
Attentive service . The burgers were fabulous and we loved cooking the chateaubriand on the hot stone . Flavour super .

Portions to accompany a little small for price paid - particularly the peppercorn sauce .
Vert tasty and really nice service! The meat was really good and the whole experience here was fantastic!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I made a reservation for my twin siblings' birthday. The atmosphere was very inviting, and the waitress, Magda, was very kind and attentive; she even helped my mother cut the meat herself. Highly recommended; no wonder this restaurant has been around since 1870. I would definitely recommend it.
In addition, the surprise dessert for the birthday was very sucessful and tasty.

The steak was done your way since you cook it on lava stones. The wagyu my wife ordered was excellent. The side salad was very tasty. The sauces were very good as well as the yogurt/garlic sauce which was the best of the three.
We had a very unique experience!! Excellent customer service. Magda did a wonderful job familiarizing us with the instructions . I’ve never experienced cooking a steak on a lava stone!!

The service from Magda was super pleasant, so was the food. It was on the pricier side but was worth every penny. The meat was high quality and the sides were really tasty. The only downside I would mention is that the sides were not included in the price of the main meal. The experience overall was very positive, I would recommend this place to everyone.

Dear gdhhg2025,

We're truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet your expectations. At DAY'S Stonegrill 1870, we take pride in sourcing high-quality meats and providing a memorable dining experience through our unique cooking style.
We understand the hot stone cooking may not be for everyone, but many of our guests appreciate the interactive aspect and the ability to cook their steak to personal perfection. 
Our meat is carefully selected and marbled cuts are a key focus—we always use the highest products and it comes in daily.  That said, we take your comments seriously. We're always looking to improve, and your feedback will be reviewed with our team, especially regarding service. 
We strive to make every guest feel welcome and valued.
We'd be grateful for the opportunity to discuss this further or invite you back for a better experience. 
Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
Great service, tender steaks, nice people watching on the patio. Would recommend. Very generous servings perfect for families.
Amazing experience, t-bone steak high quality as the normal ribs… I suggest for food and location as well. Birth celeb. unexpected gift for the celebrated.
Fabulous steaks!  Love the hot stone to cook at the table. Wonderful atmosphere and great wait staff.  Excellent touches like blankets provided outside when it was a bit cool out.

Most of the menu options require the customer to cook their own meat at their table with a griddle. What are you paying the chef for ? One of the steak options is 99 Euros ! The basics of cooking are that any meat needs resting for a good few minutes before serving.

Not recommended.
Excellent food!! The most delicious meat in Amsterdam! Magda was super in service and the cooking experience was unparalleled
Great dinner and Marta was excellent about teaching us how to cook our dinner on the stone!  Vegetables were very fresh as well!  One of the best meals we had in Amsterdam!

We got reservations last minute on Open Table. We wanted steak but we were unsure about cooking the steak at our table. BUT it was amazing. Great flavors and super easy. I don’t know that I would come with little kids who might accidentally touch the hot stone but hey dinner without kids is also great!

It was one of the best steaks we ever ate in our live. Also the servers were really nice!! You’ll see us for sure again!!!!!

The best Steak and Ribs in Amsterdam.....actually the best Steak and Ribs Ever!
We can't wait to return. Thank you to all the staff.

Great Food and very Nice Staff. The Quality of The Food was very Good. We had Steak on the Hot Stone and it was so delicious.
Bruna and Verie were awesome waitresses. Very friendly place to eat. Recommend 100%. I got the rib eye steak! My friends enjoyed their meal as well.
Valerie and Vruna, both of the staff were friendly and the food was amazing!!! We’ll definitely come back and I highly recommend!

Great food and great service. We both had steaks which come on a hot plate, making it a nice experience and something a bit different from your usual steak restaurant where you tell the chef how you want it cooked
So Unique cooking your meal on your own stone and had great service! Will recommend this to others and would definitely come back again.

Wonderful service, great food! The ambience is warm and inviting. Our server was very attentive and helpful and lots of fun! An interactive dinner with friends on our last night in Amsterdam. Awesome!
Excellent service. Great food ! went with 3 couples for dinner. They were very accommodating. Great menu options. Delicious!

The porterhouse was an experience! Not only was it delicious, but it was lit on fire in front of us! Definitely get the bread and herb butter for a starter, then save a bit of the butter for the steak. You won’t be disappointed. 
Friendly staff and cozy atmosphere.
Lovely! The whole team was great and the RIBs succulent. It was the night of the Champions League final and the boss put the game on the big screen... really top!

This was a new experience to get served beef on. Glo heit lavastein, where one even got to steak the meat to the desired degree. Myrtle and tasteful. Tasty and suitable quantity on the snacks. We got too full for dessert.
Great dinner with friends. Good meat, special atmosphere, meat cooked on lava stone. Competent and kind staff. Try it! Average prices as in Milan.
Excellent steak, served great on the stone! Would recommend! Staff friendly and food of good quality. Lovely setting and close to all the action.

We left here thinking we were not disappointed but we were definitely not overwhelmed. It is the first time we tried this concept, of cooking your own meat, and we thought it was a bit of a hassle. However, it is reasonably priced as it was 45 euros for a 300gr tenderloin and a portion of fries, although the portion of fries was small and the fillet seemed smaller than 300 gr. We think Mr Meat is a lot better but it is more expensive. If you can get to Rotterdam try El Gaucho, it will show you how a steak on a hot stone can be served, it is outstanding. Alternatively, if you are in Frankfurt try El Nigo, another outstanding steak restaurant that serves the steak on a hot stone. The difference with both of these restaurants is the chef does the cooking rather than just weigh out cuts of meat.
We ate a chateaubriand and it was amazing and we had a lot of vodka and tonic and the best Heineken on the terrace in the middle of Amsterdam. Vallery was amazing server!

This is a really unique experience! Would totally recommend the tenderloin steak. You even get to cook it yourself on a hot stone. Service was super friendly and food was great! Also food was very reasonably priced for Amsterdam.

Tasty meat in a casual atmosphere. Lots of choice of meat and burgers that you then have to prepare "yourself". The service was very friendly. We had the rib eye and the t-bone. Especially the last one was very tasty. Tip, don't leave all the meat on the stone or you'll be done after 15 minutes. We will definitely come back again because besides the meat being very good the prices are also doable.

Great experience!
Good meat and very kind staff!
We have been at the restaurant with our 1 years old baby and they are very helpful for the her food.
They also give us a table with more space !!!!

The food was delicious and with great ambience a true dream for any dinner! The service was fast and could respond quickly to special requests. We were particularly impressed by the steaks on the stone plate. It was a bit louder but still pleasant due to the guests.
Amazing Steak. Great service and lovely staff we ate tbone and tenderloin and black tiger. We loved the limoncello at the end of the night!

Interesting menu for Amsterdam..................a steak
restaurant serving beef on heated stones. Beef was quite tasty
and local fries readily surpass anything we have in the U.S.
The place has excellent service. Food was awesome. Wine selection was above average. Ambiance A1. Clean and comfortable.

Nice warm sandwich with herb butter beforehand.
My husband had the angus and I had the tenderloin steak.
It was delicious!
Friendly service and friendly staff.
Price quality thick in order!
Will definitely be back!

Delicious food and great service! Had the ribeye with a side of fries. 
Lemoncello to wrap things up was icing on the cake.

The steaks were delicious. I was nervous about cooking my own, but the server was very helpful. We ordered the fresh bread with herbed butter and loved it. Used the leftover butter on our steaks. The mixed vegetables side dish had a lot of variety and was large enough to share. Will definitely come again!

Great cuts cooked as meat should be, over hot stones. You cook it to your own taste. Located is what could be seen as the street of steaks, this is the best one. The staff are very friendly and attentive to your meal. Even though it can be busy you will also get their attention, and fast. Big thank you to Magda and Pavli. Very nice restaurant. See you soon.
Great spot, great food, great staff. Service was awesome and the food was reasonably priced. Great dinning experience.

Went for my boyfriend’s birthday and I let them know I hoped they could have done a little special treat. However after notifying on the booking my and in person this was forgotten about until I had to get up and remind them again after receiving the food they had promised would have the birthday message within it. We then asked for the bill as we wanted to move on to the next place and this took about 20 minutes whilst staff just spoke to eachother. Upon complaining and relaying my feed back we were treat with hostility and that they have tried and are “busy”. The waitress was very rude and sarcastic and said we did give you a scoop of ice cream on the house?

Food was very good. The meat was tasty and tender, the schrimps wasn't that good i guess frozen! Half of the service was very nice and friendly the other half you could feal they hate there jobs!! Come on girls! Smile and a least pretend to be friendly!😉

Super! Just great! Service, food, vino from A to Z great. The food was served quickly. Super delicious and nice to look at. The service 1a, the wine empty? No problem, they pour. Very thoughtful. From starter to dessert super delicious!

We had a lovely evening. The service was very accommodating and very attentive. The hot stone and the quality of the meat was just perfect.

Well we arrived early to the restaurant and were told to come back on time. I appreciate we were 20 minutes early.  Potentially I wanted a slightly more polite delivery of that message.  I didn’t take offence as I appreciate there are cultural differences where people can be direct without intending offence. 

The menu is extensive and with every form of steak you wish. 

The bit I missed when booking was that the Stone block is brought to the table for you to cook yourself.  I had chosen a T-Bone, which now in hindsight is not the most ideal.  I regard myself as a bit of a steak connoisseur.   So for me it was disappointing as the resting of the steak I regard as important as the cooking.  Equally I would normally baste my steaks etc.  this is cooked and eaten by you with no ability to do this. 

For me  it’s about the experience and not the taste.   The wine was reasonably priced, as well as a pleasant Malbec.   The waitresses were fine bar one point.  She told me she would return with a sharper knife to cut the bone out, she never returned. 

We both enjoyed the meal.  However, in hindsight I wish I booked elsewhere for a slightly more fine dining experience.  I appreciate not knowing what I was letting myself in for was my error not the restaurant’s.

Very good food, prepared on the hot stone just in front of you. Warm and friendly service, especially from Magda, who helped a lot in the ordering and preparing our meet. Definitely will visit again!!

My wife and I went to Day’s Stone Grill based almost exclusively on Trip Advisor reviews and rankings - but for us the restaurant failed to hit the mark. Our biggest disappointment was that we had to cook our own protein - steak for me and shrimp for my wife. You order the steak and when you’re ready for the main course you get a wood tray with a blistering hot stone and the raw meat is put on the stone after a few instructions on how to get your preferred doneness. Now there are a lot of carnivores - some in my own family - who would love this. So if that’s you, by all means go for it. We just happen to prefer our restaurant experience to be good food, well-prepared by the restaurant, and brought to the table ready for eating. My one objective knock on Day’s Stone Grill is that it’s extremely noisy in the restaurant. I was sitting across the table from my wife and we practically had to text each other to have a conversation.

For the food we ate: bread with a garlic butter  was ok; mixed green salad - again just ok; shrimp, pretty good; tenderloin steak, very good; french fries , meh; other potatoes, pretty good; dessert (waffle deluxe), we couldn’t finish it because it had a really strong taste of oil.  The service was excellent. The servers were attentive and knew the menu well - our server answered every question we had and was unfailingly pleasant. Total bill for two people, including a large bottle of sparkling water and two glasses of Malbec: 108.45 euros.

Bottom line:  note to self; remember that if a place is highly rated and you don’t like it, look within.
Everything was amazing , people were nice,  busy so relax and enjoy and have a break. Good food and a nice variety in the menu with choices for everyone.

This restaurant is very near my hotel and look on TripAdvisor. I was astonished to see how many five star ratings there were so tempted to try it.

Here’s an idea  if you want to cook your own steak go to supermarket spend €8 on a steak go home and fry it in a pan or you can pay five times as much to do it sitting in this restaurant. You’ll get the same result  

I kind of get the concept, but I also don’t 
I don’t want to go to a restaurant and cook my own food 

The steaks were average they were not bad at all, but they weren’t amazing

At the beginning, you will receive a short explanation of the procedure from the staff. Afterwards you have the option to choose from a variety of premium meats from the menu.

After ordering, you get a hot stone brought to the table.

The raw meat is placed on top of this by the operator. Afterwards you are responsible and can roast the steak according to your own wishes, just as you like the cooking degree.

All the necessary hints are received from the very friendly staff that is always available for questions, short hand signal is enough.

This restaurant is just great! The meat on the stone is highly recommended. In addition, the operation is very attentive and child-friendly. Can only recommend!
Great food, friendly atmosphere, top notch service! The servers made sure that we r enjoying the meal ! Thanks a lot and we booked for next day as well!
Loved the ribs.  Good vibe inside. Great variety. Magda our waitress was excellent. Great experience.  Really enjoyed it overall
Great food and service!! It was as a wonderful experience with the hot cooking stone!! A definite must for everyone! Quality 100%
Great food at a good price ! Service top! Ambience appealing and the staff super nice ! We come regularly as always !

Lovely food, a bit on the more expensive side but none the less, delicious and friendly staff.

We had a tenderloin and a t bone, chips are charged extra which it a little strange but cam with 3 sauces.
We had a great time at days stone grill we had our steak flamed table side which was an experience but the quality of food was also great. Server was fun as well.
Get the cote it was fantastic service is amazing casual vibe great spot for a fantastic steak you will leave happy. The servers are very nice ask them their recommendations

Great overall food! I tried the tenderloin and the cut was perfect. It was a fun a fun experience with the stone grill and a perfect dinner activity to sit outside on a nice summer day! Thank you so much!

A pleasant atmosphere, nice service and good service! They work with Hot Stone, so you are actually allowed to barbecue yourself, but you are always helped and the service is very attentive. If the place is full again, it can happen that it gets a bit stuffy and warm.
Super super service, meet lovely and well aged and food and a nice atmosphere, topped off with nice people and lovely weather.
Great service and excellent food.  Cooking on the stone was slightly intimidating but Magda helped us ensure perfection. We thoroughly enjoyed the experience.
Tasty as always, good food, nice people taking care of you. A clear recommendation and not flooded with tourists. If you have a chance to eat here do so!

I booked a birthday meal for my friend while we were in Amsterdam. Not only was the food amazing, it was excellent value for money. I loved the hot stone steak cooking! 
Staff were so friendly and welcoming. 
They even did a special birthday surprise for my friend which was great! Thank you so much

We had an amazing dinner! The food was really good.
Our server Magda was so nice and made sure we had everything we needed.

It was super tasty, it was the best thing I ever ate in the Netherlands.
Honestly that salmon blissful!
And very friendly service.

Exceptional steakhouse in the heart of Amsterdam. We went for the Tomahawks and had to be carried out of the place after!

Our waitress Valerie was very knowledgeable and all smiles. Would highly recommend 👍🏻
This is a great dinner spot! Food served hot and fresh and friendly staff. Would recommend! I had the rib eye steak and it was good.
modest setting, rather narrow menu, ordinary service, prices in line with average. Ultimately an unpretentious streakhouse
Excellent food , awesome service , many thanks to Magda , under her guidance the experience was amazing ! Try the rib eye steak for sure !
Excellent service!! Totally will recommend it, especially under Magda’s guidance!!! Very nice and delicious stakes

Awesome food
Awesome service 
If you love meat, this place is for you

Close to the main train station
Easy to get there by tram

Might be considered pricey
3 people and we paid 200 euros, we did have the wagyu!

Magda out waitress was wonderful

We ordered a rib of beef with a portion of fries. French fries are unfortunately frozen potatoes in small quantities.
The meat was correct, we enjoyed being able to warm it on the stone, but overall it did not taste much.

For a 55th room served with salad, we had a tiny ramekin of salad to share... 

The staff was friendly.
The food was amazing! The steak was so buttery, cook yourself on a cooking stone so you can get to your perfect texture! The staff were lovely as well explaining everything along the way!
Great food and excellent service. We come here every visit to Amsterdam. Great steaks cooked on a stone and the Wagyu steak is amazing.

Dear Sue,

First of all we want to thank you for your visit and we are happy to hear that you have enjoyed the food. We have service and quality as our top priority! However I think you understood something wrong. We don’t charge any service fee, this is something you can put by yourself. however depending on your card there may be a transaction fee applied to it. This goes to your credit card company and we don’t take this.

We hope to see you soon again!

Team DAY’S
The staff was great!  The food was excellent and our waitress was outstanding and friendly.  The waffle desert was the best!
Amazing service and amazing food! The steaks and tomato soup were amazing. The waffle was so good too! Would definitely come back!

Amazing food and atmosphere 
Will go back next time I’m in Amsterdam 
Amazing drinks and amazing service, 10/10 evening!

Fantastic dinner with a fantastic maitress like Martha that attend us pretty nice and was always busy at we had a great time during our time here. The quality of the meat was specially fine also. 10/10.

Very good steak  very frendly Service 
Ist very quite and a nice Restaurant 
I had a rib eye steak 400g and it was great......!!!!!
Lovely dinner out.  Food was excellent, drinks delicious and served by a lovely waitress who gave us a table and looked after us very well.
I went out to eat alone and got a table by the window and cost me a lot! Great service, great food! They were available all the time and I can really recommend this place.
Nice place for dinner out with friends and family. It’s in a great location close to everything and amazing food to add along with it plus a nice beverage
So nice for food and drinks. Friends and I had a great catch-up and were talking all night with the great, helpful and friendly staff!
I had the ribs, they were very delicious and large portions, I would recommend them to all of those that enjoy meat, the sauce and salad was very delicious 😀
Very nice service. The sirloin stake was very good and you got to cook it yourself. The fries and sauce was good and enjoyed it a lot
Excellent food and service. Sat outside which was pleasant atmosphere. Steaks on hot stone was a cool experience. Would definitely go back!

We enjoyed some fabulous food here, the steak was juicy and tender and the hot stone means you can cook your own meat exactly the way you want. Perfect and delicious.

The service was good and it's a great location, not far from Central station.
Great experience. Super nice stuff. We didnt wait long for anything. Good wine recommendation. Good steak variaty. 👍👍

This is a wonderful spot for GOOD (REAAAAALLY GOOD) meat, wholesome portions and overall a wonderful evening! If you're looking for a place to have a lovely dinner with helpful staff who make great suggestions but don't bother you constantly THIS is the place! Teenagers in our family approved as well and we managed to catch the EURO2024 game as well!!! Thank you everyone for a lovely time...but then again hospitality runs in your veins!!!😉😉😉
Excellent food and great service. The menu was well explained and the wine we had was quite excellent. Using the stone was also a lot of fun and a good experience.
Great steak really enjoyed it. Service was really good and it was nice and warm sitting outside. No issues at all, would 100% come again
Awesome meats ! Desserts a must ! Definitely will come back in my next trip to Amsterdam.  Good ambience excellent staff service. Average price.
The steak was so gooooood. the sides were incredible and I loved the atmosphere. The servers were super helpful in explaining the whole thing and it was overall a unique and delicious experience.
Amazing. Delicious and I can't wait to return. 5 stars are not enough for the wonderful culinary experience we had on a special day.
It's good and the atmosphere is very good. However, they charge a 4.5% credit card fee which is added to your bill.
A perfect lunch and exceptional meat. A big thank you to the service provided by the little French girl. Charlotte. We will surely come back.
Super tasty meat! Also very customer friendly (also to our 1 year old son). Come here often and are always very satisfied!
Amazing tenderloin great friendly staff, a wonderful experience with the family, everything was great…..should visit again

I was eating with a friend on a Saturday evening, the service was super fast, the ribs for my part were very tender and very incredibly good, the sirloin beef with pierrade was perfect. Dessert was clearly the best part, it was incredible (Belgian waffle, Nutella and vanilla ice cream). Really recommended!

Restaurant serving meat and fish dishes. It is possible to book online and see part of the menu. I attach a photo of the menu to get an idea of the costs. The first cost (when there are different grammages/weights) refers to the lowest price (therefore the prices increase). If you take meat (steaks) a boiling stone is brought to you so you can choose the type of cooking yourself. The meat comes from different countries (USA, Argentina, Great Britain, New Zealand, Japan with wagyu, etc). To drink you can choose between (expensive) wines and beer. We took Argentinian ribs, 400g New Zealand rump steak (served with salad) 2 portions of potatoes (sauces and other side dishes are always costed separately) 3 beers (1 affligem dubbel, 1 affligem wit, 1 25cl Heineken), 2 desserts (1 cheese cake and 1 waffle). Cost €86.10. More than decent quality of the meat, sufficient desserts, good side dishes. Friendly staff, good service but poor ventilation of the room (the smells remain on you when you leave). You can also pay in cash. Correct price for Amsterdam venues.
Very tasty food, super friendly staff, and - overall - an amazing experience! Definitely coming back here on my next trip!!!
It was really delicious. Quiet and peaceful place. Great service and good food. We got both bread and coffee and tea on the house. Can be highly recommended.

After ordering, you will be given a hot grill stone 
at your table. The raw premium meat is placed on it and the piece is fried to perfection right in front of you, according to your wishes. Why to perfection? It's simple. You are responsible for it yourself and can only blame yourself if it isn't perfect 😉
Very nice food. A few members off staff, but not all, were rather rude. This ruined the experience of an otherwise nice place to eat.

Food was great, and the ambiance was good. Enjoyed the hot stone way of cooking the steak as it was different and interesting way of presenting the menu. Service was ok, a bit inattentive but it wasn’t a problem.

Really nice restaurant. We were a group of 10 people, and we had an amazing time at the restaurant.
Two of our group members, needed a customized menu, which they got🤩
Clean restaurant, and friendly staff. We had the 3 course meal, it was delicious. 10/10 would recommend.
Got a nice surprise at the end of our visit🤩

Very good food, nice people who works here,  and fantastic atmosphere! Lovely Limoncella at the end! Good service😁 The beer was good, with lemon at the top. Had a great time with my friends. First time grilling my own beef, fantastic!

Nice restaurant with excellent food! Good atmosphere, nice services that guided us through our first time dinner here!
Would recomend this resturant if you want a really good steak!
This was really an amazing place to eat dinner at! Good atmosphere and very kind servers. They serve amazing food at this place😃
great place to go with friends. good atmosphere, nice music and free shots after dinner! would very much recommend this restaurant.

We ate outside on the terrace, nice
The products are fresh, even for tuna lovers, I recommend. Served with small sauces and a salad with good vegetables (especially tomatoes and cucumbers). The service is so-so...we feel like it's the chain...

Had a wonderful experience at Day's Stonegrill. Delicious four course meal, with the meat cooked how I wanted it on their hot salt rock. Ended the meal with the most tasty dessert, the waffle one with vanilla ice cream and chocolate Nutella. Highly recommend.
Fantastic experience. I highly recommend anyone who enjoys eating out to venture into this restaurant. I would definitely eat here again.
Dinner was absolutely incredible. The steak and shrimp was so good and magda was so helpful and great. Highly reccomend this spot to everyone! Such a food spot!

An outstanding restaurant with a unique flare of having you grilled the steak at your table using a very hot stone surface they provide. At first, I was a little concerned about it, but it was very easy and enjoyable. The service was outstanding, and the wine choices were great.

This was one of the best steaks I've ever had. The seasoning was spot on, and the sear on the outside provided a great contrast to the buttery soft interior. 

Thank you for the restaurant owner Ezzat and his family 

Mohammed from Saudi  🤩
Super meat. Excellent service. And above all fast. Welcomed even if late. But always with a smile. Thank you
Excellent quality of meat and great service. We would definitely recommend this restaurant to everyone who’s a meat lover.
Really enjoyed our meal here. Waitress very friendly and helpful. Cook your steak to perfection on lava stone, great fun. Will be back again soon.

You cook your steak on a stone slab , meat very average quality. Portions small.
One of our party had the ribs which were definitely the best option 
But beware as a tourist if you want to pay by credit card there is a charge approx 3% 
Not mentioned anywhere on the menu. 
I would avoid and go to the many other restaurants where this is not the case .
Awsome service and amazing fOod. Enjoyed my birthday vera much. Verð good surprice at the restaueant. Thank you á lot!!!!
Absolute perfekt and wonderful food and staf 👍 recommend this place !! Dont miss this place. Went here for my 50 birthday!
Excellent restaurant, I recommend visiting it two or three times! Great service and food! Great presentation of food!!!!

Dear SoloTraverller,

First of all we want to thank you for your visit at our restaurant. We ask all the guest with each course if everything is alright and you said everything is perfect.
It depends of your steak if it's chewy or not, that is why we explain which steak is very soft and which are chewy. That is a personal preference. You see on the picture a cups with 3 sauces, but you need to order the extra sauces. As I understand you didn't order addinational sauces as our garlic sauce is already standard with each plate. 
Thirdly we don't take this additional fee, this goes to your card company. That is why you gave the option to reject it and to try another card.  There are also a lot of card where you don't pay a addinational fee from your card company. We just want to let you know that we don't take any of this fee!!
We have service and quality as our top priority and we hope to welcome you again in the near future!

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
I come here almost every month and each time I enjoy my dinner a lot, I’m planning to bring as much as people I know so that they can also enjoy the amazing food. Everyone is so welcoming and kind!

Menu stood out from the street, good atmosphere, nice waitress serving and going through the menu with us. Food was delicious, ours was 'cook it yourself' on a hot plate but unsure if all steaks are like this. All round lovely experience!

The meal was excellent, you can cook your own steak to your liking, service was quick and they spoke several languages also.  They will do anything to accommodate and meet your needs, I would return to this restaurant

Delicious food, nice concept, good quality. Minus... waitress started clearing the table while I was still eating. That feels like you have to quickly make room for the next customer and that is not pleasant
Visited in May with friends and had a delicious meal. Brilliant concept, lovely food and great service. Would highly recommend.
Delicious food! Excellent price-quality ratio, fast and professional service. We thoroughly enjoyed it ♥️ thanks Valerie and the rest of the staff 👍

Very nice address in Amsterdam for lovers of good meat!
It's a shame that the deventure of the 4 doesn't look like much because the interior is superb... Industrial type.
The cuisine is very, very good, rare and ultra tender meats, perfect hamburgers and ribs to die for.... Don't hesitate to taste the homemade bread served with garlic butter...
Very very nice address not to be missed for lovers of very good meat!
Great restaurant in the centre of Amsterdam.  Lovely atmosphere, really good service and the food was amazing.  I would recommend.

Great steakhouse, fast service, friendly staff. Advised.
The only flaw: you come out "smoked" due to the smell of grilled meat
The rib eye and tenderloin were both very tender. I like that you cook your own steaks on a stone at your table. Our server Magda was very nice helpful. We enjoyed our meal.

excellent meat, extremely attentive and kind service, we definitely recomemend it! you cook your own meat (or fish) so you decide if like it rare or well done... delicious. very good prices for this quality

Fun idea where you get to pick your cut of steak and cook it to your liking at the table.
Food was delicious and staff was friendly. Enjoyed it and would come again!

Amazing steaks and fish and seafood. 
All served on the stone to cook at your preference at the table. 
They were flexible even though we were a large group.

Amazing place, super friendly and great food! Wine pairings are good and on point.

Would recommend going here as a couple, or as a business meeting. Food was prepared fast aswel
The meat is delicious, menue is simple and obviously concentrated on meat. The staff is super friendly. Definitely recommended

Food was very tasty! Options for starters and sides were a little limited and the portions were on the smaller side. Overall a very enjoyable meal with friendly service, good quality food, and nice ambiance. The fries are more like very crispy and perfectly cooked potato wedges.

The place is a cross between Pub and Hamburger, rather than Steakhouse, even if on the menu there are several cuts of meat that can be cooked on the griddle at the table. Unfortunately this leads to the place being quite full of the smell of cooking meat, which you then carry with you when you leave.... If the place is full of kids it also becomes particularly noisy. In short, it is perfect for a young target who wants to have an evening in company, perhaps less so for more mature customers who want to dine in peace. Good burgers. Average prices for burgers, higher for other cuts of meat
Excellent service, great options, delicious food and tremendous unique dining experience. Highly recommend.!!! Check it out.

The fun thing here is cooking your own steak on a very hot stone delivered to your table. Delicious food and a nice buzzy but not noisy atmosphere. Chips were wedges and were good but not the best. Burgers also v good. Would reccomend.
Very good address, excellent quality meat and the concept of stone cooking is great. We highly recommend!
Very tasty! The hot stone is highly recommended. We had a sirloin and a ribeye. Both were very tasty. The service staff are very friendly. No mass processing. Definitely worth a visit.

The most incredible place to eat we have been in the heart of the city of Amsterdam, so unique, so special, and the food tastes incredible. Who thought we would also have so much fun with the steak and cooking it to MY preferred temp. Amazing honeymoon spot, we will come again!
We came here on a wing and a prayer and were blown away by the service, the fun time, and the absolutely delicious food. We will be back!
Super tasty food. We really liked the concept of cooking your own steaks on a stone plate. The chess cake was also very tasty. The atmosphere was a bit loud and hectic
Second time here and once again it was great! Great staff and the food was amazing. We will definitely go back when where here again. Magda you are awesome!!
Wonderful food and amazing service. We had an amazing evening. The steak was absolutely delicious, and the concept with the stone plates was definitely something new.
Choice of my son for his birthday, parking is difficult but easily accessible by public transport. Food was great, the service gets a 10 from me. Definitely worth repeating.

We had a lovely evening here.  When we arrived it was bustling and were seated at the wide central table where we found it hard to hear.  I spoke to the host who was sympathetic but really had no other option as he needed other seating for groups of five.   So we settled in and explored the fabulous menu and placed our orders.  When we were only a sip or two into our glasses of wine our server offered us a better table, apparently freed up by a couple who had finished their meal! 

The food and service is fabulous and the place is warm and cozy.   Upon leaving I told our server and host that this was my first night in Amsterdam but if I lived here I would come often.   They made us feel very welcome.  Thank you.

We stumbled across this restaurant by chance, and what a find! The majority of the menu is suitable for coeliacs (various steaks and chips) with only the bread and burgers not. We ordered our cuts of meat / prawns and then hot stones are brought out to cook them on. Chips were GF and staff had an excellent awareness of gluten free and cross contamination. 

The food was really good and it was such a fun evening, cooking the steaks at the table. There wasn’t much for vegetarians but then this is a steak restaurant.

Would definitely recommend.

the restaurant for meat lovers

Very friendly welcome and setting, a little industrial
very nice choice of meat, Argentinian, Scottish, American..... possibility of choosing the desired weight on certain meat.
presentation and cooking on board, which allows you to choose your cooking level.
accompaniment of a small salad, possibility of ordering bread, rice or fries as an accompaniment

the meat was a real delight
to recommend
AMAZING STEAKS ON THE STONE GRILL AND EXCELLENT SERVICE! EXCELLENT I ALL ASPECTS! Amazing t-bone, porterhouse and cote de boeuf!

Fantastic!  A surprise birthday meal for my wife. All the family had secretly flown out to Amsterdam and were in the restaurant when we arrived. They played happy birthday and had the table set up with a banner and petals sprinkled. We opted for a set menu. The food was excellent. The staff were excellent. Cooking our own steaks at the table was something really different and great fun!  The atmosphere was great. Highly recommend this restaurant!
Unique way of preparing cuts of meat on hot stone grill delivered to your place setting.  Great service.  Good value.  If we lived in Amsterdam, we would dine here regularly.
Great vibe. Amazing food. Excellent service. First time in Amsterdam and really recommend. Great evening all round and will be back
This is a steakhouse you must visit when visiting Amsterdam. It is delicious when cooked to your desired level on a hot stone plate. The soup was all delicious too.

The food was very good. The meat was good. The starters were unfortunately a bit expensive. We lost a point because the elevator was apparently broken. It smelled so bad of fried meat and there was smoke in the room that we wanted to finish quickly, even though the service and meat were good. Our food was no longer usable.
Amazing food , fantastic service, lovely  friendly people,  my birthday celebration they made it special for me, we’ll be back.

The food was remarkable and the staff was amazing!  I highly recommend for a “couple” or group!  You will NOT be sorry!

Jeff - South Carolina, USA
The food was outstanding, best steak and atmosphere I’ve ever had. The staff was phenomenal. The entire staff was very attentive and all worked together to make experience outstanding.

Incredible, steak was perfection. Was a super fun experience and the staff are so attentive. Definitely worth a visit. Small restaurant but know exactly what they are doing. Will be coming back when next in Amsterdam.
Personel was amazing. Very good quality of meat and a unique experience eating the porterhouse steak. Also the restaurant was very clean. I highly recommend it.

We really enjoyed our experience at this restaurant. My husband and I both ordered 'hot stone' meals - me, prawns and him, a steak. You are delivered an incredibly hot flat grilling stone, along with your raw meat/prawns and some sides like potato wedges, sauces and salad. You will be given instructions on how to grill your food and let the fun commence! There are other meals available that do not require the hot stone if you are not keen on the idea. The staff were welcoming and attentive. Excellent fresh waffles for dessert!

Do keep your eyes open for this place. It doesn't obviously say 'Day's Stone Grill 1870' on the outside of the building. We walked past it, before having to retrace our steps to find it.
Excellent barbecue place in the center of Amsterdam. The meat is cooked directly on hot stone plates. Excellent meat. Very kind staff! We returned for the three evenings spent in Amsterdam.

Beste Tom V,

Bedankt voor uw bezoek. We wzijn blij te horen dat u heeft genoten van het eten. Wij hebben service en kwaliteit hoog op vaandel staan. We nemen dit dan ook zeer serieus en hopen u later nog een keer te mogen verwelkomen.
Team DAY'S

Dear has74,

First of all we wnat to thank you for your visit and we are happy to hear that you have enjoyed the food. We have service and quality as our top priority and we book for each table 2 hours. So you shouldn't have got the feeling to be rushed. We are sorry that we didn't' meet your expectations and we hope to welcome you again in the near future!!
Team DAY'S

We weren't sure which red wine we wanted to drink… Very good selection. We opened a bottle but it was a bit too sweet for us, it was absolutely no problem and we tried another bottle which we found tasted much better because it was dry. Very polite service, everything was very clean and the meat was just perfect. When we are back in Amsterdam we will definitely make a reservation here again at Stone Grill Amsterdam!

Nice place 10 minutes from Amsterdam Centraal Station. It's a grill with the peculiarity that you make the grill yourself! On the hot stone you can cook meat or fish yourself.
The food is really excellent. Friendly and welcoming staff

Very well eaten! I recommend.
Very warm welcome + smiling staff.

The menu is varied and the lava stone cooking is a plus.
Very good food, the waitresses are great I really really recommend this restaurant it was super good good luck 😊
Staff meeting our expectations and a particularly pleasant discovery! A surprising show and excellent quality of meat!

Very well eaten, meat at the top 👍🏻
Friendly and helpful waitresses

The menu is varied and the lava stone cooking is a plus
Superb place with smiling staff and good meat. For those who love meat this is the right place…..

Fairly central restaurant. We went as a couple and ordered two 200g meats that arrived raw with a hot stone for cooking with a side of potatoes and two beers: price 60 euros for two and good quality meat. The only problem was the smoke in the room due to the meat being cooked on the tables but otherwise an excellent dinner.

A must stop if you’re in Center Amsterdam. Stopped by for a drink midday and ended up staying for hours. Drinks were plentiful and delicious, ordered food and was an excellent topper. Mushroom soup was amazing. Magda was such a delight.

From the outside you will pass by without even noticing it. Take the time to book and get in. An original concept, delicious meat and a very friendly team who bend over backwards to satisfy you. As a result, we went there two evenings in a row because we had such a great time.
Hoping of course to be able to return there one day. Don't change anything 😀

Stunning place. The experience of cooking a meal on a stone was incredible for my 7 year old children. The staff and manager were truly exceptional in their service. I visited the restaurant twice on a two day trip, that tells you how nice the restaurant was!

Stunning place. The experience of cooking a meal on a stone was incredible for my 7 year old children. The staff and manager were truly exceptional in their service. I visited the restaurant twice in a two day trip, that tells you how nice the restaurant was!
Amazing food, really lovely staff and atmosphere. The best steak me and my partner have had in Amsterdam! 100% recommend :)
The food was excellent and the service was very friendly. Overall, a very successful evening. We look forward to the next visit.

The restaurant is very cozy and the staff is friendly. The food is excellent with special cuts of meat and tasty sides! The dessert is also excellent! But we spent 3 days in Amsterdam and we went to eat there every day! If we had more days, we would have gone, for sure! Worth a visit for those who like meat!
ABSOLUTELY FANTASTIC!  The food,  staff and ambience was perfect.  Highly,  highly recommend!  They even offer complimentary limoncello.   Yummy.
Good place with grill and very tasty burgers. Staff was really nice and helpful. Later the place got a bit crowded and some dishes were creating a lot of unpleasant smoke :(

If you only go one place for a steak in Amsterdam, you have GOT to come here!

The food is amazing (best tenderloin I've had, and I live in Montana), served with the most unique presentation I've ever enjoyed! 

We came once without a reservation, but they found a place for a table and had us seated within 5 minutes.

It was SO good, we knew we needed to come back before returning home. It was just as good, if not better (we indulged in desserts, having seen them the first time).

The staff here are above and beyond, making it the perfect experience for our last night before heading home.
Such a lovely time, beautiful food and a big thank you to Magda who gave us great advice on which steak to have and great attentive service.   Will revisit next time we are back in the city.
The food was great!  Best possible choice for a last minute reservation! Also the staff was very friendly! Were gonna be back for sure.
Excellent dinner, the restaurant located in a very central location, personally one of the best in Amsterdam, friendly staff and top quality food
Food was excellent and the whole experience was amazing. Friendly and willing to explain personnel and Magda was amazing. The atmosphere of great friendship was matched by the smell of enticing steak

Had a fantastic meal for our 25th anniversary, 
Great experience cooking your own steak, 
Something very different to do, 
Lovely service & especially the extra touches

Found this on last day of trip - what a fantastic experience! The meat cooks in front of you - piping hot - well presented and service was excellent without blowing the budget. I highly recommend the rump steak and my wife says the ribs were melt in your mouth. We will recommend to anyone that we know that goes there!

Excellent place with incredible food and really polite staff. All the staff was amazing and Magda really helped us out choose the perfect  choice of meat for us as well as gave useful tips for our days in Amsterdam. You should definitely visit.

Welcoming and efficient team. The meat is excellent (2 evenings in a row)
and a very good dessert.
Highly recommended for lovers of good meat
Wow! Absolutely amazing food! The service was also terrific and the staff were very friendly and made our visit more than enjoyable. Would recommend highly!

A really great meal and super friendly service. The steak on the hot stone was great! For dessert we had the tiramisu which was also excellent.
A must for every trip to Amsterdam👌

So, I will start by saying the food was pretty good. French fries were nice, but they charge you extra for everything; it is a money dump. It works by you order, and they give you a raw piece of meat, which you pay for, but you pay extra for fries, sauce, and everything else. As for the staff, as soon as we got in, there was an issue with our reservation, and after waiting, we sat, and they rushed us so much. Two seconds after we sat down, she was staring us down and came back four times within probably 4 minutes to ask us if we were ready to order. Then, when our food came, my friend asked about the sauces because one got sauces and one didn't, and the waitress snapped, "I can take the sauce away from you." It's just so rude and snappy for no reason. After, we asked for a box, and we had about half the plate back since the food was fine. She said she'd take it to the kitchen to box it, and she returned with just a piece of the steak in a plastic grocery bag. We asked her what happened to the rest of the food, and she said, "Oh, I'll ask the kitchen." So she came back, and they had put like 5 fries just on top of the steak in a loosely covered piece of aluminum and thrown it back in the bag. She was very rude, but the food was good and fun to cook our own. It was just frustrating.
100% - sensational quality! Top meat, friendly service, absolutely justified price-performance. Absolutely recommended!

Very tasty food! Unfortunately, the service was a bit incompetent... The system with the sauces is also a bit confusing... We were told that there were no sauces with the meat, but if we pay extra for pepper or mushroom sauce, we get 3 sauces?!? Unfortunately, these weren't listed on the menu, there was only mushroom or pepper sauce... So we all ordered pepper sauce with the guarantee that garlic sauce and herb butter would be included, then the plates came with mushroom sauce, pepper sauce and herb butter... Then we only ordered fries twice because we're not big eaters, but we all got 4 fries and were charged for all of them... So it didn't really work out... Although we are fluent in English, so it wasn't a problem with our communication... A real shame because the food itself was super tasty!
Great food, great people. Great service and the food was definitely recommended. The meat was of very good quality and perfectly seasoned.

Dear Furbea,

First or all we want to thank you for your visit and we are happy to hear that you have enjoyed the food. However we have different price categories, we have steaks starting from €19,- and we have the more exclusive steaks too. The price for the salmon is €24,95 including fries, salad and tartare sauce. First of all we want to thank you for your visit and we are sorry that we didn't meet your expectations. We have service and quality as our top priority and we are known for this.
