I came across this place by chance on Tripadvisor while looking for a restaurant close to our hotel. I made a reservation through their website because the concept seemed different and I was curious. If you are going for dinner, make a reservation or you may not be able to enter.

The place is a little small, but it has a very nice atmosphere. The staff is very friendly and their service is very fast. As soon as we sat at our table, they asked us if we had any information about the concept. You choose the meat and sauces (mushroom, hot, etc.) you want from the menu. They bring you a hot stone and you cook your meat on it yourself. French fries and a small salad are also served with the meat. There are many different types of meat from the menu on their website. There are also fish options available.

We ordered T-Bone steak, tenderloin (200 gr), tramisu, cheesecake, a beer and a coke. We paid 105 euro bill. Since the T-bone is thick, it came sealed and slightly cooked first. The tenderloin was served directly raw. When the meat arrives, they tell you how to cook it according to the type of meat. Cheesecake was mediocre but tramisu was amazing. The meat was also quite delicious. If your only goal is to eat steak, you can find cheaper steakhouses around. But in terms of concept, I haven't found anything similar recently. We went for my wife's birthday. If you specify this when making the reservation, after you eat, a torch comes to the table and plays music, giving you a little surprise.

I will definitely come back again when I come to Amsterdam.
Magda was perfect as our host. She gave us everything we didn’t know we wanted, and the selection was magnificent. Brava Magda.
Very good place to eat meat. Welcoming service and staff, interesting menu and well-stocked plates. Excellent meat. Prices are reasonable. We left happy and satisfied with our choice.
Wonderful food and service. Steak was a superb cut and excellent flavour. Really looked after us. 100% recommended and would come again. Service in particular was first class. Thank you.
Great experience cooking your food on a stone yourself. Great service and food. Takk fyrir okkur!!!!
Amazing place, great food and great drinks! Service was amazing, would definitely recommend going here!

While Amsterdam is a big place with a lot of hidden gems for you to discover, Days StoneGrill is a gem, but not a hidden one whilst being one of the top rated restaurants in the area and for a good reason.

Days StoneGrill is a purebred steak house, with a big variety of beef cuts, high quality meat and a welcomed selection of burgers too, with the Wagyu burger being the crown jewel. 

The staff was phenomenal, super friendly and helpful throughout our stay, providing deep detailing of the catalogue and helping with pairings etc showing deep knowledge and passion on the matter. One of the best staff team I've ever saw, their service quality was flawless! 

Closing my review, Days StoneGrill is a must visit spot in Amsterdam being one of the best steak houses, with fair prices  with an outstanding level of service.

The decor is very nice. The staff were very welcoming, efficient and friendly. The quality of the products is excellent. Restaurant a little noisy but that's really a detail. And above all the concept is brilliant, original and tasty… grilling your meat on your own plate

Here for the Amsterdam Marathon we treated ourselves to an evening out to visit the city centre. Booked through TheFork, we were greeted by what we thought was the head waiter.
Smiling, polite and extremely helpful.
He immediately showed greater attention to my allergies (reported during the booking phase) and was able to recommend everything that wasn't even contaminated.
Excellent meat, beers too and “wow” desserts.
At the end of the dinner he also offered us a digestive.
All the staff who took turns serving our table were highly trained, polite and always smiling.

An experience worth remembering to say the least!
Very nice warm steak house  with very nice food clean. the service  always with a smile to serve you politely, good prices.Definitely I will come back.
Birthday dinner for my boyfriend, honestly it was the most amazing experience they really went above and beyond to make it a memorable visit, we will definitely be back. Thank you all! :)

We had such a wonderful experience at Days Stonegrill. We were celebrating our engagement and the staff was so friendly and truly went the extra mile. They gave us a larger table by the window to accommodate our champagne and food. The food was amazing. We loved the stone grills for cooking your own steaks. All in all, amazing service, atmosphere and food. We will definitely be back the next time we’re in Amsterdam.

We were there for the first time and were thrilled. We had a steak platter for two people. It was a unique experience for us to grill the meat ourselves and it tasted great.
I reserved a table in advance because it was my husband's birthday and asked online whether it was possible to get a "special" table. We had a "normal" table but nonetheless my husband got a cheesecake with a sparkler and the whole place sang "Happy Birthday". At first I thought it might get lost because I had reserved over a month ago. I thought it was great that the staff had remembered.
Conclusion:
Great tasty food and very nice, great staff. We'll be back on our next visit ❤️

Went here for a meal with my wife, whilst on holiday.  There are a lot of steak houses in the area, but tried here.  Firstly staff where friendly enough and explained how the steaks came out on a stone and you cooked them how you want.  Got drinks ordered food all good.  When the food arrived the side of fries was as a guess freezer wedges nothing special, and then cooked the steak on the stone as explained by the staff.  My wife had the ribs which where cooked well but little flavour.  We where not asked if we wanted any more drinks the whole time we where there and took a while to get the bill.  Toilets not the best wobbly tables when cutting steak and unattentive staff.  Would not go again and looking back just paid steakhouse prices to cook my own steak feel a little stupid now.

This place is amazing, so understated as it really is the best. The steak was perfect and such good value for money, the bread and wine were delicious and they treated us to limoncello and ice cream for my husbands birthday. The staff were all lovely and we’ll definitely be back as soon as we’re in Amsterdam again, we’d recommend to anyone looking for a great steak meal. Thank you!

The food was gorgeous and the staff amazing. What else is there to say.

Had to write 100 characters, this covered it.

Started with the WAGYU STEAK which was more than delicious. Had a home made sauce next to it which was actually finger licking. The steak couldn’t be even more juicier. I can write a whole book about this meal ever since it was this perfect. We had no room anymore for a dessert but after seeing it pass by the other tables we had to take it. We chose the best dessert. Don’t past it by; the WAFFLE DELUXE!! Overall a great experience with great food and service!  🥩
Fantastic service from start to finish. The food was exceptional. I highly recommend anyone who is wanting a steak to come here.

Our experience here was amazing! Magda was especially a FANTASTIC host! Knowledgeable, attentive and kind; excellent service all around from all staff. Magda pretty much picked out all of our meals lol and they were a big hit! We ordered the Tomahawk, the Wagyu 😍 the Château Belgrave bottle of wine and some fries, all soooo tasty! I then indulged in a tasty ice cream and whipped cream dessert, and a good ole limoncello.
We will be back! Much love from a couple of Londoners 🇬🇧

Very good and tasty meat, the location is great and the staff is very friendly and funny!
There are also Italian ppl in the staff (very very nice!)
This place is amazing!!! Great atmosphere and the food was gorgeous. Loved the idea of cooking your own steak. Best meal in Amsterdam.
Amazing experience, delicious food. Initially wary about cooking our own steak but it was well worth it, the steak melted in the mouth.
The dishes are generous, the meat is of very good quality and the service is lovely. I recommend for meat lovers. Vegetarian dishes are also available.

Excellent experience, with top-notch meats. Cheerful service, exceptional atmosphere. We didn't have a reservation, but the manager did everything he could to accommodate us. Note: we had a table for 8 people.
Excellent food & excellent service! Went to celebrate my fiancés birthday and they were  incredibly accommodating!

This is an awesome twist on eating steaks. They start by searing it for you and then have you cook it over a hot stone but continuously check-in. The atmosphere was awesome, the food was delicious, and the staff was great. They do the birthday singing and everything for those who plan for that type of thing. 10/10 would recommend to anyone visiting Amsterdam.

The best restaurant by far!

The restaurant has a few outdoor tables, some covered by an awning. Not far from Centraal Station. Even inside, it id not a big place so make reservations if you can. We walked by around 5 pm, and it was not crowded, made a reservation and returned with the rest of our group of 6 at 6:45 and the place was packed. There is one large communal table that could fit a large party or can be used to accommodate a few smaller parties. Nice atmosphere and good prices. All the staff were very nice; Magda was our server and she coached us through ordering and cooking. Large menu with steaks, fish, soups, salads - plenty to choose from. Steaks are brought to the table raw and you cook them yourself on a 400 degree lava stone. Not only is this a unique and fun experience, but it was delicious. The surf & turf was wonderful - a nice cut of tenderloin plus 2 shrimp. The meat trio was good (two different steaks and lamb) - overall a lot of meat, but the lamb portion was smaller than preferred. The T-bone was a little tough and required a bit of work to cut away the fat. The chicken kabobs (which are not cooked by you on the stones, but in the kitchen) were very good. Fries were a steak cut and were wonderfully crispy. All entrees come with a side salad - other sides (like fries, bread, rice, etc) are additional charges, but also good portions. Caution should be made with small children, as the stones could be dangerous.
It was a great experience. Great food, atmosphere and friendly staff. Visited this place teice and don’t regret it at all
Very Authentic chic restaurant in the middle of Amsterdam with great food, drinks and service I’ve never tried better steak before cooked in front of me on a stone grill and super good prices!

Really near to central station which is very nice to reach out to this place. Lovely atmosphere and people. Will come back when in Amsterdam!!!!

Dear BAnnemaryX,

First of all we want to thank you for your visit. We have quality and service as our top priority and we are known of our fair prices compared to the quality.

Secondly you have two options of wagyu burger. You Wagyu burger and Wagyu burger xl. So we assume that you ordered a wagyu burger but you expected an  XL.

Thirdly we ask all our guest with each course if everything is alright and as you didn’t mention anything we can’t take any action for you immediately.

Fourthly, when our lovely guests are visiting us, it’s because making your own steak on the stone is a lot healthier than grilling it. The process to prepare the stone and bring it to the table is more work than you think. 

We hope to welcome you again in the future!! 

Kind regards,
Team DAY’S

The service was excellent.  Excellent meal in a nice setting.

Recommend you book in advance. Friendly and super helpful staff, great dining experience cooking food on the hot stone on the table. The garlic sauce they serve the food with is to die for. Absolutely outstanding food! I had lamb cutlets that were beautiful and other half had ribeye steak that was amazing. 

All staff spoke English really well. 

100% recommend (maybe not if your a vegan!)

The menu options were quite varied; I had lamb chops, my friends had steak and seafood.  The salads and mains were very high quality, and the wine list suited the food perfectly.  Service was much better than what you often experience in Europe.  The only advice I would give is they need to provide a little more explanation as to how to cook your food on a rock to get it right.  I cook a lot so I figured it out.

The concept of grilling the steak on a hot stone is really nice and the steak cut itself was amazing. The BBQ Ribs was tender as well. Really recommended.

I had the absolute pleasure of dining at this restaurant recently, and let me tell you, it was nothing short of a culinary revelation. The star of the evening, the steak, was simply phenomenal.

From the moment it was placed in front of me, I was entranced by the perfect sear that gave it a crusty, caramelized exterior. When I made that first cut into the steak, it was as tender as butter, the knife gliding through it almost effortlessly. The interior was cooked to my preferred medium-rare perfection - a warm, pink center that promised juiciness.

And oh, the flavors! The rich, beefy taste of the meat was elevated by a delicate balance of seasoning. Each bite was a burst of savory satisfaction, with just the right touch of salt and pepper enhancing the steak's natural deliciousness. The accompanying sauce - a silky, robust concoction - added an extra layer of complexity to the dish without overshadowing the star.

The steak was not just food; it was an experience, a celebration of quality ingredients cooked with skill and respect. It was, without a doubt, the best steak I've ever had in my life. The memory of it still lingers on my palate, and I can hardly wait for the next opportunity to relive this gastronomic adventure.

If you're a lover of steak, do yourself a favor and visit this restaurant. It's not just a meal; it's an unforgettable experience. Five stars all around!
Good steak cooked on a stone at your table.  Great service—they care about your total experience—even to Americans!  Highly recommended
This place was so delicious! The steaks come out on a stone and is cooked in front of you. First time I have ever had a hot steak from first bite to last bite! So unique! Great experience!

Absolutely delicious! The tenderloin steak was phenomenal. Cooking it yourself is a little stressful the first time, but comes out sooooooo good. Absolutely coming back!!

Ask them to turn off the pink lighting (on the bar side) or sit on the other side of the restaurant-- hard to take pics!
Amazing steaks and great fun that you get to cook it yourself! All the staff were lovely too! Definitely recommend.
We had a beautiful lunch - the Gambas was to die for and the servers were amazing with brilliant recommendations!
Atnospehre in restaurant was ok but offered steak was not as good as expexted. They Did try to correct it but as we know when it not good to start with then  evening is not perfect

Great Tenderloin steak - really liked the novelty of having to cook it ourselves, was one of the nicest steaks I’ve ever had. Service was really friendly and atmosphere was really nice, would recommend!

The organiser of our trip to Amsterdam had booked Day's for the Saturday evening of a long weekend. The menu is split between dishes that are cooked for you like a normal restaurant and dishes that you cook yourself on a hot stone slab that's brought to the table along with your side orders. On our first visit I went for the one-person mixed grill, in which you're provided with three chunks of meat that you grill to your preference on the slab; the meat was tender and tasty, and the side dishes and sauces very good.

Half the group stayed on for a long weekend, and on the Monday we decided to go back to Day's. This time I chose the pork tenderloin. The staff made an error and brought a beef one instead; I pointed out the mistake but said it was fine, it looked really good so I'd be happy to stick with it, but they insisted and in just a few minutes I had a sizeable quantity of pork (which was, again, excellent). The wine list was perfectly fine (the Malbec was our go-to, which was very palatable) and although it's not the cheapest restaurant you'll find, it was very good value as the quality easily justifies the price.

Check out Day's if you're in Amsterdam. It's well worth a go.
Delicious food!!! Amazing service!!! We ate the Black Angus and have to say is the best one so far!
Excellent restaurant, really good find, would certainly recommend. The steak on the stone was amazing. You really must visit.
Amazing experience, great choice of food, friendly attentive staff. Great dessert menu and cocktails also  would highly recommend

This is really a fast food restaurant. Not a relaxing experience at all. There were at least seven waitresses hovering around the tables the whole time we were there - it wasn’t attentive, it was uncomfortable! Main courses were nice, but if you do go for a dessert don’t expect it to look anything like the menu picture! And don’t expect home made, more out of a freezer packet.

Excellent restaurant with great service and variety of dishes!
The staff was really friendly and the food was really tasty and and the meet we choose amazing.
Definitely recommend.
Only Magda!!!! The best manager! The food is perfect !!! 5 STARS - it’s time to relax and burn the taste.    !!!!!! It’s amazing
We were here after a conference, very accommodating. The food is incredible! Defo recommend going here. The location is really convenient too
Amazing food, service, and experience. Could not recommend this any more than my 5*s. Would absolutely come again.
As a Texan, I eat a ton of steak. Honestly, their steak was amazing and the best I've had in NL. Next time I find myself here I will be back.
Excellent food and a wonderful environment. The service from Magda was first class.  The wine selection was very nice, we preferred the de bortoli from Australia
Fab restaurant.  Food really good and very tasty. Service excellent and staff are very attentive. Would highly recommend this place.

We had a excellent meal at Day's Stone Grill 1870.
We had fillet steaks which we cooked ourselves at the table on hot stones. The steaks were both tender and full of flavour. The accompanying sauces and sides were very tasty.
The staff were excellent - polite, friendly and very helpful - nothing was too much trouble.
Highly recommended!
Choose your piece of meat (unless you opt for ribs or something else), then cook it right in front of you on a hot stone. Food was good, service friendly.

The steak was amazing- so tender and so juicy! The staff were really friendly and it was a really lovely evening. It comes on a hot plate, which was a very unique experience, and the food smells so good you could smell it from down the street! Highly recommended!

Fantastic restaurant and experience. The tenderloin steak was delicious! It came raw and it was cooked live in front of me on a hot grill! 

Excellent! Thoroughly recommend!
Nice experience, great service. Food was good. Plan for the stone meal and you get to cook yourself. Dessert was delicious.

We found this restaurant on OpenTable and made a reservation for our last night in Amsterdam. The food was amazing. My husband ordered the wagyu burger and I ordered the sirloin which I cooked myself at the table on a hot stone. That was fun although we both smelled like steak for the rest of the evening! Our service was very good. We enjoyed sitting at a table for two by the front window.

Fabulous lunch, hot stone brought to your table and you cooked your meat how you like it. The waffle for dessert was amazing and the staff were very helpful and friendly. A great place to eat in the centre of Amsterdam.

A very busy and popular steak restaurant at the top of the red light district. Unexpectedly presented with our own hot stones to cook our rib-eye and pork loin at the table (didnt see that from research!), great fun cooking to our tastes. Peppercorn, mushroom and garlic sauce finished it off. Attentive staff and prebook to avoid missing out!
Such a great experience! We had a birthday here and they made it so fun!  Valerie was awesome! It was the best!

We each ordered the Wagyu burger and it stands up to its description of being the best burger you’ve ever had! It was so delicious—literally the best of my life. The fries were a bonus being perfectly crispy. Service was great too. Will definitely come back next time I’m in Amsterdam. I highly recommend!

It was my hubby’s birthday so I found a place where you can cook your steak on a hot stone at your table. It was an easy trip using the 2 or 12 train towards Centraal Station. The seating is tight, but we made friends with Linda and Tony from Atlanta GA who were sitting next to us. 
Our food arrived promptly, because it arrives raw, and we got right to cooking. The steaks were tender and juicy! I secretly asked for a server that speaks Spanish and arranged for a candle in his dessert. And what a candle!! The servers were so friendly and helpful!! We would definitely go back, if we were still in Amsterdam.
Really nice food and lovely service. Had the rib eye steak on the grill. Lovely lighting and clean bathrooms.
Great meat! And a really nice atmosphere with lovely service!!! Lots of choices to choose from, with a great location.
Great sirloin steak and best tuna steak ever. I think it is very unique to get it on a stonegrill!!!
Absolutely amazing this was the first place we stopped getting to Amsterdam and it was absolutely fabulous the service was amazing and food was mouth watering
Great place to go in general - the steak was delicious, servers were friendly, and atmosphere was nice. Would definitely go again.
Amazing! Incredibly fresh food, served with deliciously prepared french fries. Very inclusive restaurant with prime staff!

Very cozy surroundings
Excellent food quality
Original idea-feels like you cook your own dinner
Warm & cordial service
Makes you feel you’re having dinner at a friend’s house
Very good steak! Lovely servers and good environment! Stone steak with ribeye was crazy! I will be back!

Excellent food and service. Really top notch. Kid friendly. The steak was fantastic and the sizzling hot stone was a fun experience. Desserts were yummy and we were even treated to a coffee on the house!
The service was excellent and the food was very good.  It is always fun to cook the food on a hot stone and you can be sure it is cooked to your liking!
The service was amazing. Great atmosphere and music that’s easy to vibe to. They gave my boyfriend a great happy birth song! 10/10 recommend
The service was fantastic and the food was perfect the display of the food cooking in front of you was everything I needed
So fun!  We all loved the sizzling rocks!  Great variety of various meats!  Cooked the steaks perfectly!  Kids had fun ;)

We came in for a quick dinner before exploring the night life and were not disappointed. The staff was warm and knowledgeable. The service was very quick and all the food we ordered was great. I came with two of my girlfriends and we had a great time and we’re very satisfied with everything.

Amazing friendly service. Our first time at a stone grill steak type of restaurant. They guided us through how to cook everything and what was best to order and even took our steak and cooked it all the way to perfection. We had a 10pm reservation (they close at 11pm) they were accommodating with our short amount of time and even gave us a free drink on the house. 5/5. Highly recommend!
Novel dining experience. Flaming Tomahawk Steak on hot stone was delicious. Waffles to die for. Staff very friendly and service attentive.

Great food,  super nice to grill your steak yourself at the table. Lovely personel.

Easy to reach by public transport.  And if you are already in the city center  it's not far from Amsterdam central Station
Was an amazing experience for dinner. The staff were very friendly and helpful. The food was gorgeous and the presentation was impeccable. Definitely recommend!
The atmosphere was brilliant. The staff were great and very welcoming. Absolutely brilliant experience, 100% recommended.
Amazing steak! Really good experience. Highly recommend! Staff were really friendly and the atmosphere was sizzling!
Amazing food, lovely atmosphere and the staff were lively too ! Would really suggest giving it a visit ❤️
Best place for steak in Amsterdam. should go here for stone grill. We will come back for shure when we are in Amsterdam. Nice Valeria
Really excellent food and great service. The extended family of 7 went, and they were able to seat us with a reservation. We had a wonderful time! Have some dessert!
That's very good. The Steak's are very tender and the sauces are very good to. The Burger was good to and the ham was tender to. Highly recommended.
Good food and staff. Very busy book in advance. Kitchen at back extremely hectic. Smoke from food means you'll have to wash clothes after!
Unique experience, Excellent quality, and lovely servers who took great care of us in every way!!!!!
Food was wonderful and the service was over the top. I recommend this restaurant to whoever wants those two things!
Always friendly personel and good food!! Recomend it! It's always fresh meat and you feel realy comfortable!
Always a great dining experience. Fresh meat on a stone grill. Amazing taste and very friendly people!

We arrived 20:30 (with a reservation), and the staff set us at the table. Than, when we were looking at the menu, they asked to go to another table (linked with strangers); so the situation wasn’t as good as we expected.
After waiting almost 10 minutes standing up, we could sat again at our table and we ordered: I personally ordered a wagyu burger XL; it came at the table without cheddar (that they added after I asked), and also without warming the cheddar.
The meat was well done when it was supposed to be medium/rare.
The price is very expansive for what it offers.
At the end we waited 10 minutes for the bill, after we asked.

Great place for steaks in Amsterdam. Nice concept, great quality. The service amazing. All the team very kind and nice. The concept of finishing your steaks at your table with individual lava stones is cool

The quality of the meet is awesome! I can compare to the beef I eat in my country(Brazil). 
The service is also amazing. I strongly recommend.
We had delicious food and really good drinks. Really recommend the place. Excelent food and excelent service.
Fabulous spot with amazing food and service! Gluten free options available and staff are fabulous at making sure GF measures are taken within the kitchen. A must visitor in Amsterdam!

Dear eighteensixty7,

First of all thank you for your visit at our restaurant. However not everything is correct what you wrote. Yes we did a mistake with the steak, but we gave you the option to do it in the kitchen, but you didn’t want it anymore. I came personally to you and asked if you want an extra plate so it will not be over cooked and you told me there is no need for it. Superb on every way. Would highly recommend.  Book for sure.
Great atmosphere   great food. Wines very good.
The first word out of my son’s mouth was “wow!” Our meal was fabulous. My son had a steak and I had the pork tenderloin—both were mouth watering.

So we chose this restaurant the day of, and they were able to accommodate a party of 8. When I tell you the food is seasoned and top tier. Chef kiss, we love the atmosphere here.Magda knew her stuff and helped so much. Would definitely come back before our trip is over.

I had the lamb cutlets and they were *chefs kiss* 🤌🏾I tried my husbands steak and… I kid you not. That cow had a good life. The equivalent to our beloved chick fil a chickens. You can tell the cows were raised in the country side. Magda was phenomenal with her recommendations, she told me to get the cheesecake, hands down best cheesecake ever. Not to mention the close proximity to the train station. Please do yourself a favor and make sure you go!!

This place is amazing , the food experienced was nothing second of amazing, the food staff was kind and patient with our large party. Magda took care of us, and provided needed insight into what was the best bang for our book

This place was our first night in Amsterdam with a table of 7. They set the trip off right !! Personalized menu selections please ask for Magda as she took great care of us. Left the misses feeling special ! I know we will be back here. Maybe this week before we leave , but definitely the next time we’re in AMS. #MustGo
The food, the customer service, the presentation. Everything about this place was spectacular. It was a dream come true honestly. Highly recommend 10/10
Great experience grilling dinner! Beetroot vegan burger was delicious!!!! Would definitely recommend and come back again!
Our dinner was wonderful. Our waitress gave us a recommendation to share a 900g steak. Very tasty. The desert was  very good as well.

An amazing place. The staff was like really helpful and kind and the food was absolutely delicious 
We mafe
Amazing food, amazing experience, Our waitress Magda was phenomenal.. it was my birthday and I was surprised with a firework and birthday song! 10/10 place.. highly recommend.

Lush meal! Was spot on.
Magda was brilliant, really made the experience and her recommendations were absolutely worth it! Thank you Magda! 
She even sorted out a birthday surprise for our friend. Lush time!
We arrived early for our table and was made to feel very welcome , The steaks were perfect and very tender . Great experience and would definitely come back .
Fabulous food, lovely atmosphere with excellent staff. Excellent value for money. Will definitely be back
Friendly service & cozy atmosphere. Hot stone grill, so cook your steak as you like it - a personal favourite. Ribs were good, too.

Amazing food and really good stuff . 
Don't hesitate to ask the staff for recommendations. 
I would come back here for sure

Normally the idea of cooking when we go away for a holiday or a break doesn't appeal to me at all.... 
However this was an experience as well as a meal. My other half opted for the ribs which come all ready to eat,  My son and I opted for the steak and lamb cutlets. Presented with salad and a hot stone, we were given our raw meat to cook. A brilliant quirky idea but the food was absolutely delicious. Thank goodness they don't make you wash your own dishes before you leave.

Great meat. Great experience. Excellent service. Staff was excellent.
We ordered Rib Eye stone grilled stakes. Flavor was perfect. But the best is the whole experience in a really nice environment
It’s my second time here and sure not last time. Amazing food and very attentive staff, highly recommend!!!

Good place to be at . The food was in red it is recommended and delicious. I love the gray European people. The best plate is the cote the boef. We will definitely be back soon. I loved it. Thank you for the great experience! The steak is the most DELICIOUS thing ever…. 😍
Excellent food and service,we had dinner here on sunday which was excellent from start to finish, great service from friendly competent staff and the food was really excellent, highly recommended

I recently visited your restaurant with friends. It was a delicious meal with fast service friendly staff and a good atmosphere. Also very accommodating in accepting such a large group. Would highly recommend.
Such a lovely restaurant with amazing staff, beautiful meat ! Will definitely be eating here when we next come to Amsterdam !
I visited this restaurant for my 21st birthday and it was amazing!! All staff are so friendly and welcoming, nothing is too much trouble! Would definitely recommend!
Great food and good service at a good price,came for a friends birthday and the service was impeccable and very friendly
Steak was perfect and the service was great. Staff were really handy and helped whenever and wherever they could. Would recommend!
The steaks were amazing as well as the service. Depending on the steak you cook it by yourself on the hot plate to what temperature you want. If you need any help as well they’re so helpful.

This place has actually the most delicious steak in whole of Amsterdam. I would not be able to want to miss this place ever. Overall great experience on the hot stone with the nicest waitresses! They make you smile the way you want to enjoy the food:)
This restaurant was really enjoyable. The waitresses were very polite and attending. The steak was delicious
Service and food were incredible. Loved the atmosphere and positive vibe. The food was amazing and cooking your own steak on the table was a great experience. Would absolutely recommend.
The service was very good and all the staff was very nice with every nice food. We had an amazing dinner!!!
Absolutely fantastic food steak was unbelievable mushroom soup just made your mouth water will definitely be our go to steak restaurant in Amsterdam in future

This was the best experience we had in Amsterdam and the best steak we have eaten the last year. The porterhouse and the cote de boeuf are so tender and with the fire at the table, they took the steak to the next level. The servers were very kind and friendly. Advised us for the steaks and we are happy that we followed the advise. This is a place for steaks that you need to try whenever you in Amsterdam. Thanks to the whole team!!

The steak is served on a hot stone, but no plate is provided, so after a few minutes your steak is completely over cooked, no member of staff came to our table aside from taking our food order, no one came to check how our food was, and we even had to find someone to try and give payment too. 
If the gimmick is to cook your own steak, you should provide a plate to put your steak on when it’s to your liking. And unless you’re spending money on bottles of wine, you don’t receive any service. 
Good selection of wine, and sides were nice, but service was really underwhelming.

Fantastic steakhouse!! Amazing meat and lovely attentive friendly staff, The best steak I had in a very long time. 
And a very lovely event celebrate a birthday.  We will definitely be back !!
Atmosphere, location and pleasant staff full of personality define our dinner here tonight. And the food was brilliant! Will be here every trip to Amsterdam.
Enjoyed my food and experience at Days Stone and Grill. The service was excellent. If you are on the area, you must stop by to enjoy the food if you are in the area.
Everyone was so friendly and wanted to make sure I was well taken care of. The food was really good and I definitely would come back.

An interesting experience of preparing your own dinner, the food is not bad, some better, some worse. The biggest problem is the smoke, as soon as everyone start cooking you feel like inside a barbeque grill, we all left the dinner smelling of smoke.
It also felt like not all meats had the same quality, some felt of lower quality and some of higer (just to make it perfectly clear, the lower quality meats were still good and tasty, just less than some other). The service was good.

Dear 191christinal,

First of all, all our burgers are freshly made and we didn't get this complain before. We gave you what you asked after you also have ate it. So we really don't know were this review is coming from.

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
Great place, great food! The music, culture, and customer service is is outstanding! I’ve visited many places before and this is one of the top restaurants by far.
Like the experience, the food was amazing, the music, the vibe and the rumps steak was amazing highly recommended

Came here for the first time and the food was great.
Atmosphere was impeccable and the service was top notch.
Lovely restaurant with a lovely atmosphere. Very relaxed and romantic. Sirloin steak we both had was delicious and we got to grill it ourselves at our table. Really good experience

So we turned up at a place that looks a bit suspect, but OMG!! 
Had the best service ever from the waitresses and the food was unbelievable.
This is a  real Resturant with steaks on hot stones that deliver the goods.
Try it and be Satisfied
Booked for Valentines based on previous reviews and was not disappointed. Food was delicious- Staff were great and atmosphere was superb. Will definitely return.

Absolutely fabulous meal!!! 
Lovely atmosphere !! Brilliant staff and tasty food - v central near central station . We will be back

It’s my first time in amsterdam and my boyfriends 21st birthday. I really wanted to make sure we had somewhere lovely to eat for the day of his birthday and booked here months in advance thanks to so many lovely reviews. The staff were welcoming, food lovely and i would say very cheap for how lovely it was compared to the price of the rest of amsterdam. The waitress was great at helping us chose which steak we would prefer and showed us how to cook the steak correctly. When they brought over our desert they played a birthday song for my partner and also put a sparkler is our desert. It was a lovely evening, me and partner even said out of all the lovely reasons we could have to move to this city, this restaurant was definitely the top reason! Amazing
A new experience for us with delicious food. I loved that they tell you exactly where their meat and seafood are sourced from.
Great atmosphere and excellent, friendly service. Food was delicious and the staff were really helpful and informative.

Great stone cooked steak 
Good seating and atmosphere, for both couples and groups 
Staff are very attentive and know their steaks and wine
Will return on any visit to Amsterdam

This is one of the best places in Amsterdam if you like steak. The meat is top notch only surpassed by the wonderful staff and the owner. I have eaten steaks all over the world and this place is in the top five. 👍😊
Beautiful meal and fantastic staff. Was recommended to try here and it did not disappoint. Stone cooked steak so able to ensure cooked to own liking, very helpful and attentive staff

Amazing service by the staff here. The tenderloin steak was amazing. 

Went for lunch with my wife when in Amsterdam. 

Some nice music too 😎

Would definitely come back!

Absolutely wonderful meal only matched by wonderful service. Made my birthday trip to Amsterdam even more special. Highly recommend sizzling rib eye steak. Very tender,  juicy with excellent service from Manta! Thank you for a wonderful meal.
Friendly, and fast service. Was great experience. Having your meat sizzling away on a hot stone was fun! A great atmosphere - smells great as soon as you walk in (like bbq)!

We spotted this restaurant whilst we were walking near our hotel - we booked it for later that evening.
Food was really good, staff were excellent and price was great value!
This place will feed you well and look after you!

I am a grill guy and so I know my way around meats. I liked the idea of cooking the steak myself using the hot stone. I ordered the carpaccio and the t-bone. The carpaccio was well made and presented.

The steak was good, even very good. My beef (excuse the pun) were the french fries. So much lack if effort. Think the cheapest frozen fries (you could taste they were that kind). I expect more than that at a steak house. Respect yourself and your customers. Knocked a point just for that.

Service was good. Atmosphere excellent.
Amazing food and the service was impeccable. Went back the evening after for their Belgian waffle dessert because it was so good. Thank you very much 😁

A steak place that I’ve never experienced in the States - 9 for the taste, 10 for the style!

Easily the nicest staff that I have ever encountered!

Amazing steak, great people. Thoroughly recommended and a great find. 

Ordered the T-bone and for the price, service and ambience - would be back x100

This was a great experience, great food and the steak was just great!
I really recommend this place for steak in the centre of amsterdam!

This was actually an amazing piece of steak. Delicious how to cook it yourself. I loved the whole vibe and they already seasoned it for me in the kitchen. I am glad I went here while visiting Amsterdam and would recommend this place to anyone looking for g good quality steak!
Amazing atmosphere, staff and food is out of this world and the hot stone idea is amazing! Highly recommend this place if visiting Amsterdam!

This restaurant is no 11 in Amsterdam on TA. What happened there? The angus steak was fine and tasty, but sirred too long on the hot plate so you have to eat it in a rush. And what about beef that needs to rest? Fries on the menu is not worthy of a good restaurant, it is fast food. The peppersauce is a mere two tablespoons and the mayo is malplaced. The salad is ridicilously boring. This restaurant should be soooo much longer down the list, it is embarassing. The service consists of 20 year old girls that have no idea what service is and have been taught to say «enjoy» to everything, with an empty look. Low standards all the way.
Super fast, great service. Super good food. I can’t complain really! Unique style of restaurant if you want to have a good time with family
Stumbled upon this gem walking down the street from centraal station, the staff is SO friendly and inviting and the food was absolutely delicious. The waffle dessert was absolutely to die for.
We had a great time with these guys!food and service where top notch !great cooking your own food for a change.the cuts of meat very bang on!

Dear LebTraveller1,

Thank you so much for your visit and we do our best to make everybody happy. We are happy to hear that you have enjoyed it and we hope to welcome you again in the future!

Team DAY'S
Meat was incredible presentation was unexpected but I enjoyed it definitely worthwhile to come over and enjoy a nice meal

Amazing Restaurant, the best service and all staff are lovely, would love to visit again for sure!!!!
Amazing place with even better staff. Definitely recommend for anyone looking for a nice meal!!!!!😁

Is good but not as I expected. The service is fast but the meat flavor was just ok, nothing spectacular, rather average. I ordered an Argentinean cut in the stone. It was not as tender as described in the menu and presentation with salad looked just average.
My advice is come and enjoy the meet but don’t come with very high expectations. It’s just good

I thought that they made a mistake on the bill and come to find out, I was wrong. But the owner and managers were so kind and understanding, they still took care of it to make sure the customer was happy. I don’t see this too often in Holland so I was pleasant surprised and would definitely go back. The food and drinks were INCREDIBLE!!!!
It was average cold inside, burger was oke fries oke overal just average. It doesn’t deserve the 5 star rating on trip advisor but rather 3 stars. Staff is friendly tho.

This was exactly as expected as what the other people wrote.

Awesome experience from start to end. We tried the cote de boeuf and the tomahawk steak, both were coming with flambé at the table and was exceptional. They didn’t say in advance that there will be a fire which surprised us very much. 

It was a birthday and we wrote this in the reservation, after ordering the dessert they did a beautiful happy birthday song with the whole restaurant clapping for the birthday which surprised is again. 

When we are checking it again, they have the best steak that we tried in Amsterdam and the quality is perfect compared to the rest of Amsterdam. The menu is well written and described all the meat and the cuts of the meat. With a good bottle of wine from the wine menu they made our day.

This place is highly recommended when you are in Amsterdam and when you like steaks, burgers or seafood. Thank you again for the service and the great night. We will be back!!
Valerie is the best hostess. Extremely friendly and the service was fantastic. I’ll come back every year.

Excellent restaurant fantastic steak!
People working here very polite and friendly 
Prices very very good
Nice people. Great meat. Reasonable bill. What else ? Hot stone cook is a great experience that you MUST have in Amsterdam

פשוט מדהים האוכל האווירה. 
קונספט טיפה שונה אבל מדהים. שירות אדיב מסבירים על הכל מהבשרים ועד לדרך עשייה פשוט חוויה. מחירים סבבה לגמרי נוחים 

The food and atmosphere are simply amazing. A slightly different but amazing concept. Courteous service, they explain everything from the meats to the way of doing things, simply an experience. Prices are completely fair
The food and service  💯🔥 excellent!! Try the cote de boef - you won’t be disappointed, I promise! Another must try is the PORNSTAR Martini!
Perfect pricing, good service, excent location, very good food. We celebrated our Anniversary there it was six a good experience
Was good took mix grill for two. Cooked on a stone. 30 seca one side, 30 secs another. Can cut the get the best way. Recommend

My colleague and I went to this restaurant for dinner. From the service to the food everything was absolutely outstanding. I am not the type of person to leave reviews but this place is definitely worth a visit. I will be coming back very soon. The protein is of extremely high quality and the wine was extremely good (also a good variety). The service was very nice and attentive. Absolutely recommend! Thanks everyone at Doy's Stonegrill 1870!!!! Will be back very soon!

I was there yesterday, we offered carpaccio first but it was not good, the meat was middle tast. You don t loose anything if you don t visit. The only thing good is you are cooking on the stone your meat.

During a 7-day stay in Amsterdam, I was not only once but rather twice at Day's StoneGrill 1870.

An extraordinary culinary experience!

I loved everything. The welcome, the service, the drinks, the quality of the food but above all the experience of the hot stone!

I recommend it to everyone!

I can't see this as perfect.  Staff were helpful even on a busy Saturday night. 

We had ribs and salmon and they were warm only.  Obviously reheated. They did offer to heat again with no issue qnd gave us a free tea or coffee for compensation. 

The ribs were well cooked and good sauce.  The salmon had a texture hinting at prepackaged.
Great fries and salad.

Around us people had the sizzle plate and seemed happy.

Amazing food. Lovely staff. Me and my fiancé booked here to celebrate getting engaged in Amsterdam that day. It was definitely the right choice, great atmosphere and lovely food. And an amazing surprise at the end to top it all off.

Great cuts of beef and great service. We will definitely come back. This place is voted the 2nd best In Amsterdam but we think it should be number one. Thank you everyone. We had the best birthday night xxx

Dear hhsol,

First of all we want to thank you for your visit, but unfortunately we don't see everything what happened. You came in and didn't like to table that was reserved for you and we changed the table. Secondly we asked you multiple times if everything is good and you didn't mention anything negative. We serve all the meat fresh in front of you and we have quality very high in our standard. 

However we are sorry that you dinner wasn't as expected and we still hope you give us another chance.

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
Lovely place - great food - wonderful staff.  Brilliantly looked after by Valerie.  Thank you so much.

This is an excellent steakhouse, the service was good, super food and lots of little touches which make the meal. I particularly liked the waiter giving us a selection of various steaks which where fatty and also not fatty at all. She gave really good advice and also about the spectacular burgers with the colored bun. We have been here 3 times this holiday and each time we have been it# been fantastic experience. Most of the restaurants in Amsterdam have what I call"false ambiece" - where the decor is so lovely but the food ans service is lacking. This is not the case here. The service is always silent but great - meaning they are always around to get you whay you need but but don't bother you. Well worth a visit for steak lovers. The steak is to die for!

The restaurant was very nice! I really enjoyed the lively vibe as everyone was very young and cheerful. Barbara the waitress was very helpful in recommendations with the food and drinks, definitely would come back!
It was a great place. I highly recommend. My waitress was phenomenal. Please ask for barbara valerie and jojo when you come in. You gotta be here.

Food was absolutely superb and could not be faulted. However, the server couldn't wait to move us on to release the table for the next service, including taking full glasses away. The restaurant is popular and busy so to an extent is expected and we were told to vacate after 90 minites, but we had been sat for less than an hour. What a way to spend our daughter's 18th birthday. Shame on them

Thank you for the wonderful evening. We had good Merlot with steak and ribs, the service was very nice despite at first it being very busy, and we even got a surprise birthday desert on the house that they initiated themselves :) Wonderful time
Great place, nice food attentive staff and not over priced. The king prawns are amazing. We will be back in November to do it all again
It was amazing food, fast service! Definitely recommend for visiting. It’s in the middle of Amsterdam, nice location
Super Service! excellent food. very good. I had a very good steak. it was an amazing dinner in amsterdam

We honestly loved every second of it. The meat is a 10 out of 10 and the service was amazing.
If you look for a place to go eat in Amsterdam City go here. Some of the best meat youll find in town. It won't be cheap, but at least it's absolutely worth it.

We will definitely be back.

We visited after finding on TA. Warmly welcomed. The foccia bread with garlic butter was very nice

We had mains of salmon and ribs which were very good and desserts likewise

In hindsight wish I had had a steak on the stone plate as they looked amazing with neighbouring customers

Our last night in Amsterdam, we wanted to go out for a nice dinner.  Upon arrival, the place was empty, which made me question our reservation.  Within 30 minutes, the place was packed!   The wine was great and we grilled our own steak at the table.  It was a fabulous dinner topped off with Tiramisu.

I visited with my wife on a Saturday evening, of course with reservation. The reservation was easy to do through their internet site.

The place is very central, near the main train station of Amsterdam. If you come with the bus or train, you have to walk about 5 minutes from the station. If you come with the car then you can park at the central station underground parking lot. It is however expensive.
We got our table on time. The restaurant is not so big, the tables are very small and the air inside very bad. The light is low so you don't really see everything.
The service is good, the menu has what to expect from a steak house except for corn or sweet potato fries. The sauce sortiment was very poor as well. The steak variety however was good. The prices fair. The meat quality very good.

So, you get your meat raw or rare and you can grill it on the hot stone as you wish it. 
The portions are good so we didn't manage everything.

To sum up this kind of concept in a qualitative environment would be perfect. Keep the meat quality and the stones, add some sauces, sweet potato fries and corn and change the inside with bigger tables, better light and better air quality. Then you have the best place in the town.

Am i going to visit again? Not sure to be honest but possible. I was not disappointed but not thrilled either.
5* rating for everything. The Food, and staff service is amazing!!  I would highly recommend a visit.
Absolutely banging. First time ever having a Lime Merengue pie. The sorbet in the middle with the crumbly base. Toooooo goood

I loved pretty much everything except I am not sure about the “do it yourself on the grill” part, sure it is fun and engaging, but also I eat medium rare so it was easy for me, for my dad it was a lot harder. Also the prices are kind of high and I feel like there should be more things on the table like tissues and stuff. Still, the steak is good, everything is nice overall and I really didn’t see much of an issue other than the grill.

Highly recommend this restaurant if you enjoy a good steak or burger. Great value for money and very friendly staff. Ate there twice over 3 nights, steaks are tender and you can’t complain to the chef because you cook it yourself.
Definitely worth the ratings! Great food, experience and service. Hot stone steak was amazing and great mojitos. Highly recommend

Amazing experience. Food is good, but the main thing in dinner is the sizzling hot stone which they bring you and then you cook your own steak or gambas. Never seen anything like that and it was amazing.

I made reservations in advance for our group of 10 adults.  We were seated right away.  Most of our group had never cooked on a hot stone before so it was a very fun experience.  We all declared it a winner!

Valeri and yasmine the best
I like the food drinks and atmosphere
The best steakhouse in amsterdam 
I enjoyed the food here.
Best food I had in Amsterdam.  The service was great and very unique experience with hot stones. We can’t wait to come back on our next visit to Amsterdam.

Everything here was amazing! I had the cote de Bouef steak and my boyfriend had the lamb chops and the presentation is amazing. They bring out a hot plate and you are able to cook the food yourself but the staff is amazing, specifically valinari she took care of us and made sure we enjoyed everything. I would recommend coming here and I will be back.

You get the meat to cook it yourself and that could be a good gimmick, if the meat had been cut properly to cook in such a way. My friend got a tenderloin about half the thickness of the one I got, so it worked out for her and she was content with her meal. My cut was just too thick for it to cook before the stone grill got too cold. I like my beef medium rare, but had to settle for blue steak this time around as I was really hungry and just didn’t want to wait for a new serving to be delivered. I regretted not complaining about it in the moment, but I didn’t want to cause a tense situation for my friends. The meat was really tender, so that was a comfort. But it should have been salted better and had some black pepper corn before they brought it out. The fries I got had been unevenly cooked and some were crispy and others were raw in the middle… and just to top it off - the lettuce was floppy. All in all a real disappointing dinner. Too bad, because the meat had some potential.

Outstanding! I had the Ribeye and I cooked it all by myself! My aunt had Black Angus both meats were fresh and tender!! French fries were crispy. The only missing item is a bib as the searing splatters on you.
Amazing food and service! We loved everything about this restaurant. We would definitely come back!!
Very nice concept! Best food in our staying and very friendly staff. We had sirlion steka and mushrum sopa. Delicios!

Wow … so many over priced steak restaurants in Amsterdam , however this is amazingly priced for the amount of food and the experience of the hot rocks. Kids absolutely loved it. 
Friendly and relaxed atmosphere. Definitely will come back !
Great atmosphere and amazing prices for the food. Would highly recommend! Ordered the Cotê steak and it was great.
One of the best steaks I had in my life -  so tender and tasy. A must place to visit when in Amsterdam.  Also,  staff are so friendly.

I spent a magic instant. Meats  were excellent. Waiters are very sympathetic. Each meat are served on a hot stone. Incredible and amazing time. I love this restaurant and every body in Amsterdam MUST come here. 

THIS IS A “MUST HAVE” PLACE. !!! 👍👍👍
Best meal I’ve had in all of Amsterdam!!! 10/10 recommend definitely do the meal for 2 is was $65 for two perfect had us so happy!! Didn’t have a reservation and was still accommodating!!
Absolutely amazing food and service. Very polite and friendly staff. Had rib-eye steak on the rocks, and staff advised how to cook easily. Brilliant place

Dear Y5277UBseand,

First of all we want to thank you for your visit and we are happy to hear that you have enjoyed it. However we are known about our service and quality of the food and known about our ribs, because they are not pre-made but freshly made with our slow cooking technique. We ask all the tables twice if everything is good and you said everything is perfect. The only moment that we can take actions for you is the moment that you tell us in the restaurant. 

We still hope to welcome you back in our restaurant and we will keep improving ourselves!!

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S

The Pork loin was AMAZING. The way the sauces were organized and flavors were also great. Their Hot Chocolate was also very good (mostly the whipped cream, but the actual drink was also good) I definitely recommend this restaurant if you’re stopping by Holland.
Decided to eat on a temperature night and came a across a small, but very comforting restaurant. Really amazing food and atmosphere, very welcoming  and helpful for newcomers :)

We booked this not realising that it was a ‘cook your own’ steak house but it was a great experience & the steaks were excellent! We skipped starters, as there weren’t really any we fancied, and opted for main course & dessert. Loved that the menu told you the country of origin of each of the steaks too. I like my steaks medium rare & of course, it’s easy here to cook them exactly how you want it. The sauces & fries were also excellent. Couldn’t fault the main course but dessert was a little disappointing. If I was rating the main course only, I would give it a 5 but have rated 4 overall.
The food was amazing, the steak was tasty, the waiter is friendly. all by all we will definitely come back when we are in amsterdam! the tenderloin steak was one of the most tender steaks ever!

Excellent!!
The best hot stone birthday ever!!
Best time, excellent food!!
Top service and perfect spot!!
Thank you very much
The meat is amazinggggg, good service, cozy place. It is really close to the city center we loved it

We went on Sunday evening and the food was really nice, yummy and very well served. We took the grilled mix for 2. Valerie was our waiver and she did wonderful!
The restaurant has a good location and the only complain w had is that the table could be a bit bigger, that's its, but, the food perfect!

Excellent !!!!! The best place to have dinner in Amsterdam, we have had a very good experience
Don’t forget the waffle especial for the dessert !
:) the employees are really nice and the food was also good! We ate salmon and fries with special coffee
The food it was great and the people working there were extremely kind! We certanly will be back!!! !

Great team and a fantastic atmosphere! There were 4 in our party having 2 fillet steaks, 1 t-bone and 1 black angus. The 2 fillets were amazing, but unfortunately the t-bone and angus weren’t great.

The issue is that you cook the steaks yourselves on a stone block which warms the meat but it doesn’t give that tasty grilled / bbq taste that I like. 

All in all it was nice, and perhaps I’d have a burger next time.
Came here to celebrate the end of our trip and graduating university. The staff were friendly and helpful as well as being attentive to when we wanted more drinks and the bill at the end our meal.
Amazing, really good staff and really good food!! Super good neighbourhood in Amsterdam! Very recomended for everyone visiting Amsterdam!
We had 3 steaky, Cote de Boeuf, Rob eye and Tenderloin, Carpacio and mushroom soup. Everything was  soooooo good! Service as well 😍
Exceptional service and food. A must when in Amsterdam, don’t go home without eating here. Bravo day’s stone grill.

It was a fantastic Meal. If you want the best steak in Amsterdam, make sure to visit here! 
Brilliant service, brilliant food and brilliant drinks too.
The Food was very good and it was a good experience over all. I would recomend coming here for a nice dinner

Although this was not a busy night, the staff didn't really know who did what and when. 

Having the steak on a hot stone is just fine and fun, but it would be nice to have a place to put it when it's done, and not having to continue frying on the stone.
The portion of rice or fries is not very big, considered it's an add-on you pay for. 

The meat was, however, very good.
Absolutely the best customer service I’ve experienced so far! Along with the GREAT food, this is a MUST visit if you’re in Amsterdam :)

The staff is friendly. But the food is maybe not worth the extreme hype, it’s not bad it’s just not great in my opinion. I’d like to not get the meat straight on the hotplate because in a group of 6 when everyone order different kinds of meats, it’ll take different amount of time too cook you’re meat which will lead to some finish their meal while others haven’t even start eating. Also I’d like to see a veggies grill option for example vegetables to grill for yourself too. 
Sauces could be better. However it is a cosy restaurant.

Dear Rustyonew,

Thank you for your visit and we are happy to hear that you have enjoyed. We hope to welcome you again in the near future!

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
It was delicious! I would definitely recommend it. Valery helped us a very well. She’s the best. You should definitely visit them.

We came for the first time and the service and food was amazing. Valery was very very friendly and helpful.
We Definitely recommend everything on there menu.
The best stone  steakhouse in Amsterdam really good service and the best steaks with the best flavors  and our server valerie made sure we had the best night

Amazing ribs and great steak. What a great night.
We were a group of 10 and they gave us amazing cake for the birthday boy..

We had the best experience here! The food was amazing, the service was very personable and attentive, and we enjoyed spending time drinking a nice bottle of wine people watching while sitting next to a very comfortable outside heater. We will be back the next time we visit Amsterdam for sure!!  Lotunie was so kind and we will request her next time :)

Dear 2Klecks,

First of all we want to thank you for your visit. Unfortunately we think there is a miscommunication. We will never say to let it 5 seconds on each side. We tell you to leave it 30 seconds. All our product are brought in daily and also fresh. Secondly we looked back in our systems to see that it only took 3 minutes and 24 second to get your drink, we think that is pretty good when you don’t have any spaces left. 

Thirdly we ask each guest 2 times if everything is good/perfect once when you are dining and for the second time when we are taking all the plates.  I asked your personally if everything is good and you told me everything is perfect. As you didn’t mention anything we can’t take any actions for you in the restaurant. 

We still hope that you will give us another chance to welcome you another time.

Kind regards,
Team DAY’S
Great food. Great service. Nice setting. Thanks to Valeri! Fun night. It’s located on a nice street near Amsterdam central station.
Had wonderful steak, excellent beer, and wonderful tiramisu! Highly recommend! Our server was wonderful too!
Food was amazing and the staff were really helpful and friendly. Situated in the centre of of Amsterdam. Heavy recommend!
I loved the burgers. They were so amazing, they were so tender and the service was great, it was one of the best burgers I have ever had.

I went to eat with my family and we ordered a ribeye steak 300 grams, it was amazing. The service was also very good, thanks to kathy and her perfect smile that made our day! We will definitely come back when we are in Amsterdam! 🥰

We went to Day’s Stone Grill two days in a row because our kids absolutely loved it. Cooking steaks in front of you was so fun and Valerie was an amazing waitress- very accommodating and personable. She even remembered that my son didn’t drink his drink the night before and made a new one special for him the second night. Highly recommend this place!
I’m all for variety when traveling. However, after an amazing experience, we decided to come back again a second night. Great food, and ask for Valerie to be your waitress.

Thank you for your recommendation. We are always trying to give you a lovely DAY'S Dinner.

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
Days StoneGrill was absolutely amazing. Great food and great service. Our waiter "Valerie" was amazing and was super kind and helpful. Will definitely come back again.

Fantastic meal wonderful service and Valerie could not have been more fabulous
We had a sharing hot stone which was delicious. Asked for more sauces which came immediately. The rose was great value and tasty.
Did I mention Valerie? She really was fab

Dear Storyteller506644,

Thank you for your visit and we hope to welcome you again in the near future!

Team DAY'S

Dear Sir,

It was a great pleasure to meet you both. You are very lovely and kind,  we wish you all the best and we hope to welcome you soon again!! Enjoy your DAY'S

Kind regards,
Team DAY'S
Amazing food , the best steak I’ve ever had. Lovely service and staff.  Steak is served on a stone grill so you can cook your steak how you like at the table , great atmosphere.

We had a very good dinner : welcome, food and drinks were perfect!
Nous avons passé une très bonne soirée, nous recommandons ce restaurant.
we had the black angus and the tenderloin and it was absolutely top quality meat and the service was second  to none very friendly and would recommend to anyone !

Food was great, staff was very friendly! 

This is a must visit when in Amsterdam! 

Keep up the great work!
Fabulous food and fantastic service!!! We ate rack of lamb and rib eye steak.. both were delicious!!!
Very nice friendly, local restaurant with a unique experience where you cook your own steak right at your table. We did a great cooking job as the rib-eye steaks were delicious. Highly recommend…

Great experience!!! Great Food!!!
We came for meetings and with the family and had a memorable time. The service and people were fantastic! Try the ribs!!!

Making a reservation is recommended. Popular with locals.
The starters were very good but the highlight was the hot stone grill.
Had the Angus steak would highly recommend it. Friendly staff make the experience great.

What a great experience! We walked past the restaurant, then stopped to view the menu. The sweetest staff member, Valerie. offered us a table even though we didn’t have reservations. The food was exceptional. I had the ribeye cooked on a hot stone, my husband the schnitzel. The steak was melt in your mouth delicious and the schnitzel was yummy. We splurged and split the lemon meringue pie. Yummy! The service was great even though they were busy and short staffed. I would highly recommend this restaurant if you’re in Amsterdam!! We look forward to visiting them again!
Food was first class, we all came out very full, the staff were helpful and very friendly, we would definitely visit again when in Amsterdam
Delicious food, super nice & service minded personnel, clean&tidy location with a good atmosphere. A great dinner experience the first day in Amsterdam :)

We were hungry and passed by this restaurant and decided to give it a try but did not expect much . We had rib-eye streak and it was juicy and juice and perfectly seasoned . Also the vegan burger had an amazing taste abs cage with a delicious relish . The prices are fair abs the service is very good . Highly recommend this place
Great place.Great food.Nice people.Great experience.Got to make our own steaks!Yum.Highly recommend this great place.
I would highly recommend this place for both the awesome food and the awesome food. Cooking the steak myself was the highlight. The staff are very friendly, courteous, and knowledgeable. Five STARS!

DELICIOUS! We came here and did not know that it was served on a hot stone. We were so surprised when the food was served on the table. This was really a place where we enjoyed our food and the athmosphere is amazing. Good music and service! Thanks and will come back when we are in Amsterdam again!

This was an exceptional meal. It’s our first meal out in Amsterdam on holiday and I’d recommend it to anyone and everyone. The drinks are delicious (my partner loved her cocktail). We had a Rib-Eye and Tenderloin steak cooked at our tables in a hot black stone and it was an incredible experience, very filling and packed with flavour. The prices were reasonable for quality and deserts very tasty. If you’re looking for a meal out as a couple or family, this is the place to go! Staff very attentive and friendly, and food came very quickly (perhaps a little too quickly if you’re wanting a slow leisurely meal?).

Amazing experience. my girlfriend made me a surprise for our birthdays, 6th and 8th of June, and bought a trip to Amsterdam. Without any plan. We were looking for some nice place to have dinner to celebrate ours birthday. We found the best one. The staff was simply amazing and professional. The quality of food was really good and prices were really reasonable according to location! They brought us even a desert with candles and music. No words. Highly recommended.
Amazing restaurant. The grill was fantastic. The staff is very welcoming. The atmosphere is warm and fun. Resev in advance and don't miss.
Excellent service and delicious steak. It was fun to cook the meat at our table. Great outdoor seating. Whole family really enjoyed the meal.
The Black Angus Burger was the best burger I have ever had, ever! Good service and nice space. Did I say how good the burger was?! I’ll be back
Great staff, amazing atmosphere, wonderful food! Strongly recommend coming here with friends for a fun evening.
tonight for my partners birthday, perfect atmosphere and lovely surprise dessert with a sparkler at the end!

You cook your own steak at the table which is fun on a hot stone. The food was really tasty. We had fillet, chips and salad. I didn’t quite understand why they asked which sauce we wanted as they bring all three anyway - garlic, mushroom and peppercorn. The peppercorn sauce was amazing. I would recommend this place to eat. It was busy but really fast service. Only reason I gave 4 and not 5 was for a €95 / £80 meal (2 x fillet meals & 1x drink each) it felt a little rushed and we were sat at a table near the toilet which was a bit cramped. Overall very good.
Great food great service!! Ristorante consigliato a tutti! Bravi! The meat is simply great! We'll back soon

I had the sirloin satay at Day’s Stonegrill Food Bar. It was a great experience. The food was great and the staff was very warm and friendly! If you are looking for a nice, casual place to dine for the evening, this is definitely the place!
Excellent burger - the Wagyu was really juicy - just what was needed after a long day travelling! Thanks to Valerie for the lovely service.
Great service and great food. After enjoying walking in the city we stopped for dinner. We all enjoyed the food, friendly service. Highly recommend!
Amazing staff .. amazing steak .. they serve there steak with passion .. served on a stone grill that you can cook it your way.. price is fair for good quality
Best experience the food was amazing and definitely would come again , first time in the dam and I love it
Speedy service, with fantastic food. Will 100% come again in the future. Only a shirt walk from the city center and is easily accessible.
We had such great wine with an amazing meat!! I loved that you could actually cook you steak right in front of you!
Very nice meat. Cool cosy place. Get in and order the grill on the table. Very friendly staff, always kind.
Absolutely fantastic restaurant. Food is incredible, all steaks where the best we have ever had! Staff super friendly and helped us celebrate 2 birthdays in a fantastic way! Xxxx

We wondered through the streets towards the station hoping to find somewhere to have a bite and drink before our train was to depart.  Only disappointment is that we found this on our last day   I had gambos with a side which was perfect .   lemon /Kim meringue for desert.  service was lovely too. wonderful South America vibe in the background (I know!  We’re in Amsterdam).  Please, check it out. You will not be disappointed
We had such a great time here! We got a great service with Valerie, super sweet! The meat was super tender and tasty! To go again and again

It was very nice had a great meal! And they sang a song for me felt appreciated.
Come here for a bday dinner!!
Amazing! This was for a birthday, they were so friendly and done lots for us. They set up the table nicely and put balloons on it!

First of all, Valerie is an amazing saleswoman!
She was there outside as soon as she saw us reading the menu and explained the menu so well that we made a reservation, came back, and enjoyed 2 fabulous dinners, both in their fiery hot rocks. The tuna was fresh-caught and served with 3 delicious sauces, as was the rib eye steak. Dinners came with a small salad, and the tuna also included fries-all delicious, served with nice wines and complimentary coffee.
A true jewel in a classy setting just far enough away from the red light district.

this was one of my best evenings in Amsterdam. loads of food and bunch of quality steak. It was served with 3 different sauces. the service was amazing.  thanks to Bany who was our server and who was checking upon us during our stay. we can recommend this place to everyone. we were here with with a group of 10 people. they have a very nice grouptable, its smart to book in advacr eversince

The steaks were on point, desserts were to die for and they even brought out 3 decorated desserts for our 1 year anniversary, newlywed, and 30 year anniversary for our family. It was made to be such a special night, with extremely good food and a perfect price. Thank you! Will come back :)
Waffles taste amazing. Food was good i ate a very delicious waffle with nutella and ice cream. I ate tenderloin and lambchops!
Loved cooking our own steaks and our server Lila was friendly and helpful. It's based in Amsterdam..

Dinner with 4 Adults, each ordering something different, and everyone very happy with their choices.  The mixed grill and Filets were in my opinion the best deals.  Prices are extremely fair for the quality you're getting, and service was very good.  Loved our meals and had a great time.  What more can you ask for.  Also, need reservations to make sure you get a table, so plan ahead.
Excellent atmosphere and service. Loved the whole concept of cooking your own steak. The staff were very attentive. Definitely worth a visit
We ate here recently and the food was delicious! Menu was very diverse so there was plenty to choose from. Would recommend!
The steak came on a hot stone. It was very delicious and the staff were very friendly. Would highly recommend if you would like a nice grill.
Cook your steak right at your table.  Fantastic.  Great service.  A lot of fun.  Very good meal!!!!  Recommend!

I’ve never been to a restaurant before where I myself am the chef but I have to say it was quite the experience. My partner ordered the T bone steak and I ordered the Tuna, both of which were cooked by ourselves on a hot stone. The quality of the meat and the price of it made no sense. Outstanding meat for an outstanding price. Oh and I forgot to mention we had two courses and three rounds of drinks within an hour but didn’t feel rushed. Highly would recommend here: great food, great service, great price.

Delicious food. My first time cooking a steak on a hot stone, so for me a little chaotic, which was my own fault, because the staff explained how to do it.
The rest of our table enjoyed it as well, and had had the experience before.
Some ordered sauce and some didn’t, but we all got sauces, but only those who ordered it, was charged. A little odd.
It was well visited, and you need a reservation to be seated.
Friendly staff.
The acoustic isn’t great.

Our visit was a great and pleasurable experience. The food and the service was simply great. I only can recommend this restaurant. Congratulation to the owner and his staff.
Karl and friends
Had a great meal with my friend, amazing food and service. I am vegetarian and had many options ! Felt right at home!!
Amazing service!! Valerie was great! Kitchen was super accommodating with my friends vegetarian restriction! 10/10 would recommend!!
Delicious food and outstanding service! Thanks to the staff for an excellent experience! I highly recommend. Cheers.
Food is amazing and service is top notch. Highly recommend! I had the lamb and rice and it was seasoned perfectly. The sauces that come on the side are great!
Emby was amazing throughout our dinner! Food was great and was a fun experience.  Friendly staff and reasonable prices.

A must visit steakhouse in Amsterdam. Both my hosts Amber and Valerie are excellent in service, such friendly people. 

The steaks….to die for! A must visit if u r in Amsterdam.
Thanks guys!

This is worth it. The food was so tasty. Would really come back here if I lived here nearby. The ribeye was so tender and the burger was very juicy! The waffle deluxe was also very good literally fingerlickinggg! Thanks for the good service and food :)

Took the porterhouse from their menu and it's awesome.  The whole experience is something never to forget. The waitress comes she you look at her and its very proffesional.  This was my first time in Amsterdam and for sure i will visit them again when I come. I can recommend everybody for a Delicious steak dinner.

We were so looking forward to this meal all day. From the minute we got to the door we should have turned back as the door as held closed by a tea towel. 
Cocktails were not nicely creamy as they should be.
The chicken burner was made from a frozen patty, got about 20 chips - no exaggeration. Steak meat quality was not as advertised. 
The waitresses seemed uninterested in their jobs, one of them causing a long queue in the toilet from being in there herself. Toilets were not clean. 
It was one of those meals you talk about shocked for the day..

Very nice, the staff are very friendly and enthousiastic.
Very recommended! The food is absolutely amazing.

We had such a lovely evening over here. Great service, great food, great evening, everything was perfect! The steak was amazing while cooking this on the table. If you’re looking for a good evening go here definitely

We were visiting Amsterdam during the Covid restrictions where restaurants were made to close by 5.00pm, so we booked Day’s StoneGrill 1870 for 3.30pm on our first day to ensure we had a table & it was close to our hotel, the Kimpton De Witt. The restaurant was quiet, understandably, because of these restrictions, but this did not reflect on the reception & service we received. The staff were attentive and in the 90 minutes we had before the enforced early closure, our group of 4 managed to get through 3 courses including a lovely tomato soup, Caprese salad, moist & tasty burgers, chicken satay & desserts such as cheese cake & dame blanche. The atmosphere was obviously a little quiet but our overall impression was very good & we would look to return when we revisit Amsterdam in the future. 5 star hearty recommendation.

Went to this restaurant recenlty in Amsterdam. Was exicted as it was referred by a local friend of mine.   Once we arrived, we had to stand forever before seated.  They seems unfamilar with the concept of reservations.   The restaurant wasnt clean. There was old food and crumbs all over our table.  The service was incredibly slow.   It is a "hibachi" style restaurant where you cook your own food.   The quality of the food was mediocre at best. We had beef -- it was flavorless -- and the sides where also tasteless.  It felt like a gimmicky fast food restaurant -- just slow.  The seats are also uncomfortable.   You are on hard wooden seats -- and with slow service, everyone in our party was complaining.  It was expensive for the poor quality.  There are other steak restaurants in the area -- recommend you try them.  Skip the gimmick and get good service and better food.

After 18 months living in a world made less accessible by a worldwide pandemic, my first international journey had made me more aware of what I appreciate in being able to travel again. There are, of course, many things that have changed, but dining at  Day’s Stone Grill made me realize I have a new perspective on  how I evaluate an evening well spent. A friend made the 1st reservation at Days Stone Grill, the food was good, and the evening was well spent. After my friend  left for America the next day, I returned to Days Stone Grill. Returning solo, allowed me to continue filling in the pieces of what intrigued me the first time.

This is a family owned restaurant, which  opened in late 2019 just months before being forced to shut down by the pandemic. The family poured their savings into their restaurant  and have been able to reopen. Somehow knowing the struggles many have had puts a face on sharing a meal at a family restaurant  - (not some corporate behemoth). The pleasure derived from interacting with family members who have been through so much only added to the quality of the foods served. I loved the fresh tomato soup. For my taste the hot stone cooking adapted superbly with the tuna steak, more so than the lamb chops the night before (seems I’m veering more and more away from red meats). I loved the waffle served with vanilla ice cream and hot fudge sauce. My appreciation for the dessert did not go unnoticed as I couldn’t help but capture
More of the remaining chocolate on my plate with my finger. My bad, but it was sooo good!
A
